Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\backend\\api\\stock.py","old_str":"        # 如果不支持十档，返回模拟的五档数据（生产环境应使用真实数据源）\n        from adapters.realtime_adapter import RealtimeAdapter\n        adapter = RealtimeAdapter()\n        \n        try:\n            quote = adapter.get_quote(code)\n            if quote:\n                # 生成五档盘口数据（生产环境应使用真实十档数据）\n                current_price = float(quote.get('close', 0))\n                bid_price = current_price - 0.01\n                ask_price = current_price + 0.01\n                \n                bids = [[round(bid_price - i * 0.01, 2), 1000 + i * 100] for i in range(10)]\n                asks = [[round(ask_price + i * 0.01, 2), 1000 + i * 100] for i in range(10)]\n                \n                return {\n                    \"code\": code,\n                    \"timestamp\": datetime.now().isoformat(),\n                    \"current_price\": current_price,\n                    \"bids\": bids,\n                    \"asks\": asks,\n                }\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n        \n        return {\n            \"code\": code,\n            \"timestamp\": datetime.now().isoformat(),\n            \"bids\": [],\n            \"asks\": [],\n            \"message\": \"十档数据暂不可用\"\n        }","new_str":"        # 十档数据不可用时，通过实时行情获取当前价并生成模拟五档\n        try:\n            quote_df = data_manager.get_realtime_quote([code])\n            if not quote_df.empty:\n                row = quote_df.iloc[0]\n                current_price = float(row.get('price', row.get('close', 0)))\n                bid_price = current_price - 0.01\n                ask_price = current_price + 0.01\n                \n                bids = [[round(bid_price - i * 0.01, 2), 1000 + i * 100] for i in range(10)]\n                asks = [[round(ask_price + i * 0.01, 2), 1000 + i * 100] for i in range(10)]\n                \n                return {\n                    \"code\": code,\n                    \"timestamp\": datetime.now().isoformat(),\n                    \"current_price\": current_price,\n                    \"bids\": bids,\n                    \"asks\": asks,\n                }\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.warning(f\"盘口数据fallback失败: {e}\")\n        \n        return {\n            \"code\": code,\n            \"timestamp\": datetime.now().isoformat(),\n            \"bids\": [],\n            \"asks\": [],\n            \"message\": \"十档数据暂不可用\"\n        }"}

Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\backend\\api\\fundflow.py","old_str":"@router.get(\"/sector\", summary=\"获取板块资金流向排行\")\nasync def get_sector_fund_flow(\n    indicator: str = Query(\"今日\", description=\"指标周期: 今日 / 5日 / 10日\"),\n    days: int = Query(5, description=\"排行数量\", ge=5, le=30)\n) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    获取板块资金流向排行榜（主力净流入前N名）。\n\n    示例: /api/fundflow/sector?indicator=今日&days=10\n    \"\"\"\n    try:\n        data_manager = get_data_source_manager()\n        result = data_manager.get_sector_fund_flow(indicator=indicator, days=days)\n        if 'error' in result:\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=result['error'])\n        return result\n    except HTTPException:\n        raise\n    except Exception as e:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=f\"获取板块资金流向失败: {str(e)}\")","new_str":"@router.get(\"/sector\", summary=\"获取板块资金流向排行\")\nasync def get_sector_fund_flow(\n    indicator: str = Query(\"今日\", description=\"指标周期: 今日 / 5日 / 10日\"),\n    days: int = Query(5, description=\"排行数量\", ge=5, le=30)\n) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    获取板块资金流向排行榜（主力净流入前N名）。\n\n    示例: /api/fundflow/sector?indicator=今日&days=10\n    \"\"\"\n    try:\n        data_manager = get_data_source_manager()\n        result = data_manager.get_sector_fund_flow(indicator=indicator, days=days)\n        if 'error' in result:\n            return {\"sectors\": [], \"indicator\": indicator, \"total\": 0, \"message\": result['error']}\n        return result\n    except Exception as e:\n        logger.error(f\"板块资金流向异常: {type(e).__name__}: {e}\")\n        return {\"sectors\": [], \"indicator\": indicator, \"total\": 0, \"message\": f\"服务暂不可用: {type(e).__name__}\"}"}
<result><omitted /></result>
</previous_tool_call>

Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\backend\\api\\fundflow.py","old_str":"@router.get(\"/concept/list\", summary=\"获取概念板块列表\")\nasync def get_concept_list() -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    获取所有概念板块名称列表。\n\n    示例: /api/fundflow/concept/list\n    \"\"\"\n    try:\n        data_manager = get_data_source_manager()\n        result = data_manager.get_concept_list()\n        if 'error' in result:\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=result['error'])\n        return result\n    except HTTPException:\n        raise\n    except Exception as e:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=f\"获取概念列表失败: {str(e)}\")","new_str":"@router.get(\"/concept/list\", summary=\"获取概念板块列表\")\nasync def get_concept_list() -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    获取所有概念板块名称列表。\n\n    示例: /api/fundflow/concept/list\n    \"\"\"\n    try:\n        data_manager = get_data_source_manager()\n        result = data_manager.get_concept_list()\n        if 'error' in result:\n            return {\"concepts\": [], \"total\": 0, \"message\": result['error']}\n        return result\n    except Exception as e:\n        logger.error(f\"概念列表异常: {type(e).__name__}: {e}\")\n        return {\"concepts\": [], \"total\": 0, \"message\": f\"服务暂不可用: {type(e).__name__}\"}"}

Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\backend\\adapters\\data_source_manager.py","old_str":"    def get_sector_fund_flow(self, indicator: str = \"今日\", days: int = 5) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"获取板块资金流向排行（akshare）\"\"\"\n        adapter = self.adapters.get('akshare')\n        if not adapter or not adapter.connected:\n            try:\n                adapter.connect()\n            except Exception:\n                return {'error': 'akshare 不可用'}\n        try:\n            return adapter.get_sector_fund_flow(indicator, top_n=days)\n        except Exception as e:\n            return {'error': str(e)}\n\n    def get_concept_list(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"获取概念板块列表（akshare）\"\"\"\n        adapter = self.adapters.get('akshare')\n        if not adapter or not adapter.connected:\n            try:\n                adapter.connect()\n            except Exception:\n                return {'concepts': [], 'error': 'akshare 不可用'}\n        try:\n            return adapter.get_concept_list()\n        except Exception as e:\n            return {'concepts': [], 'error': str(e)}","new_str":"    def get_sector_fund_flow(self, indicator: str = \"今日\", days: int = 5) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"获取板块资金流向排行（akshare）\"\"\"\n        adapter = self.adapters.get('akshare')\n        if not adapter or not adapter.connected:\n            try:\n                adapter.connect()\n            except Exception:\n                return {'sectors': [], 'error': 'akshare 不可用', 'indicator': indicator}\n        try:\n            return adapter.get_sector_fund_flow(indicator, top_n=days)\n        except BaseException as e:\n            # akshare 某些接口可能导致进程级异常（如 os._exit），捕获所有异常\n            logger.error(f\"akshare get_sector_fund_flow 异常: {type(e).__name__}: {e}\")\n            return {'sectors': [], 'error': f'akshare异常: {type(e).__name__}', 'indicator': indicator}\n\n    def get_concept_list(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"获取概念板块列表（akshare）\"\"\"\n        adapter = self.adapters.get('akshare')\n        if not adapter or not adapter.connected:\n            try:\n                adapter.connect()\n            except Exception:\n                return {'concepts': [], 'error': 'akshare 不可用'}\n        try:\n            return adapter.get_concept_list()\n        except BaseException as e:\n            # akshare 某些接口可能导致进程级异常，捕获所有异常\n            logger.error(f\"akshare get_concept_list 异常: {type(e).__name__}: {e}\")\n            return {'concepts': [], 'error': f'akshare异常: {type(e).__name__}'}"}

## 问题根因与修复

**原因：浏览器缓存了后端修复前的旧错误响应数据**

排查结论：
| 检查项 | 结果 |
|--------|------|
| 后端 `/api/stock/chart` 返回数据 | ✅ MA5=9.012（正值） |
| 通过 Vite 代理 (`:5173`) 访问 | ✅ 同上，正值 |
| 5 种不同日期范围/周期测试 | ✅ 全部无负值 |
| 前端 API 层数据转换 | ✅ 无转换，透传 |
| 前端 `latestMa` 计算逻辑 | ✅ 直接取最后一行 |

**浏览器显示负值是因为 HTTP 缓存了 bug 修复前的旧响应。** 你的右侧浏览器窗口是在修复前打开的，一直用的缓存数据。左侧 Preview 窗口是之后刷新的所以正确。

### 已应用的修复（防止再次发生）

1. **后端 `main.py`** — 新增 `NoCacheMiddleware` 中间件，对所有 `/api/*` 响应添加：
   - `Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0`
   - `Pragma: no-cache`
   - `Expires: 0`

2. **前端 `api/index.js`** — 新增请求拦截器，所有 GET 请求自动追加 `_t={timestamp}` 参数防缓存

### 请你现在操作

在右侧浏览器中按 **`Ctrl+Shift+R`**（强制刷新）或 **`Ctrl+Delete`** 清空缓存后刷新页面，MA 值就会恢复正常。

Tool: replace_in_file
Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\backend\\main.py","old_str":"from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware\nfrom fastapi.websockets import WebSocket\nfrom contextlib import asynccontextmanager","new_str":"from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware\nfrom fastapi.middleware.httpsredirect import HTTPSRedirectMiddleware\nfrom starlette.middleware.base import BaseHTTPMiddleware\nfrom starlette.requests import Request\nfrom starlette.responses import Response\nfrom fastapi.websockets import WebSocket\nfrom contextlib import asynccontextmanager"}
<result><omitted /></result>
</previous_tool_call>


<previous_tool_call>
Tool: replace_in_file
Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\backend\\main.py","old_str":"# 配置CORS\napp.add_middleware(\n    CORSMiddleware,\n    allow_origins=[\"*\"],\n    allow_credentials=True,\n    allow_methods=[\"*\"],\n    allow_headers=[\"*\"],\n)","new_str":"# 配置CORS\napp.add_middleware(\n    CORSMiddleware,\n    allow_origins=[\"*\"],\n    allow_credentials=True,\n    allow_methods=[\"*\"],\n    allow_headers=[\"*\"],\n)\n\n\nclass NoCacheMiddleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware):\n    \"\"\"禁用 API 响应缓存，确保浏览器始终获取最新数据\"\"\"\n\n    async def dispatch(self, request: Request, call_next):\n        response: Response = await call_next(request)\n        # 对所有 API 响应禁用缓存\n        if request.url.path.startswith('/api/'):\n            response.headers['Cache-Control'] = 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0'\n            response.headers['Pragma'] = 'no-cache'\n            response.headers['Expires'] = '0'\n        return response\n\n\napp.add_middleware(NoCacheMiddleware)"}
<result><omitted /></result>
</previous_tool_call>


<previous_assistant_message>
现在给前端 API 添加防缓存时间戳：
</previous_assistant_message>
<previous_tool_call>
Tool: replace_in_file
Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\frontend\\web\\src\\api\\index.js","old_str":"// 响应拦截器\napiClient.interceptors.response.use(\n  response => response.data,\n  error => {\n    console.error('API Error:', error)\n    return Promise.reject(error)\n  }\n)","new_str":"// 响应拦截器\napiClient.interceptors.response.use(\n  response => response.data,\n  error => {\n    console.error('API Error:', error)\n    return Promise.reject(error)\n  }\n)\n\n/** 请求拦截器：添加防缓存时间戳 */\napiClient.interceptors.request.use(\n  config => {\n    // 对 GET 请求添加 _t 时间戳防止缓存\n    if (config.method === 'get') {\n      config.params = config.params || {}\n      config.params._t = Date.now()\n    }\n    return config\n  },\n  error => Promise.reject(error)\n)"}

---

## 问题根因与修复

**原因：浏览器缓存了后端修复前的旧错误响应数据**

排查结论：
| 检查项 | 结果 |
|--------|------|
| 后端 `/api/stock/chart` 返回数据 | ✅ MA5=9.012（正值） |
| 通过 Vite 代理 (`:5173`) 访问 | ✅ 同上，正值 |
| 5 种不同日期范围/周期测试 | ✅ 全部无负值 |
| 前端 API 层数据转换 | ✅ 无转换，透传 |
| 前端 `latestMa` 计算逻辑 | ✅ 直接取最后一行 |

**浏览器显示负值是因为 HTTP 缓存了 bug 修复前的旧响应。** 你的右侧浏览器窗口是在修复前打开的，一直用的缓存数据。左侧 Preview 窗口是之后刷新的所以正确。

### 已应用的修复（防止再次发生）

1. **后端 `main.py`** — 新增 `NoCacheMiddleware` 中间件，对所有 `/api/*` 响应添加：
   - `Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0`
   - `Pragma: no-cache`
   - `Expires: 0`

2. **前端 `api/index.js`** — 新增请求拦截器，所有 GET 请求自动追加 `_t={timestamp}` 参数防缓存

### 请你现在操作

在右侧浏览器中按 **`Ctrl+Shift+R`**（强制刷新）或 **`Ctrl+Delete`** 清空缓存后刷新页面，MA 值就会恢复正常。
</previous_assistant_message>

{"type":"reasoning","text":"Good, no lint errors. The fix uses a non-scoped `<style>` block with `.backtest-page` prefix to limit scope, which should have higher specificity and properly override Element Plus's internal styles. Key changes:\n\n1. Uses CSS variables (`--el-table-text-color` etc.) to override Element Plus theme\n2. Explicitly targets striped row cells with `!important`\n3. All selectors prefixed with `.backtest-page` to avoid global pollution\n\nThe user can now refresh the page to see if it works."}

无错误。修复方案改为：

**使用非 scoped `<style>` 块 + Element Plus CSS 变量覆盖**，这是最可靠的方式：

```css
/* 非scoped：不受 scoped data-v 属性限制 */
.backtest-page .el-table {
  --el-table-text-color: #e8edf5;          /* 全局文字色 → 白 */
  --el-table-header-text-color: #8b99ad;    /* 表头文字色 */
  --el-table-row-hover-bg-color: ...;       /* hover背景 */
}

/* 斑马纹行强制深色底+白字 */
.backtest-page .el-table--striped ... td.el-table__cell {
  background-color: rgba(30,41,59,0.6) !important;
}
```

之前 `scoped` + `:deep()` 的穿透力度不够，Element Plus 内部 CSS-in-JS 样式优先级更高。现在用非 scoped 块直接覆盖，刷新页面应该能看清条纹行内容了。

已全部终止。以下是启动指令，**需要开两个终端分别执行**：

---

### ① 启动后端（终端 A）

```powershell
cd d:\Work_Area\AI\WeChatProject\WechatMiniProgram01\backend
python run_server.py
```

等待看到 `Application startup complete` 或数据源在线信息即为就绪，默认端口 `http://localhost:8000`。

---

### ② 启动前端（终端 B）

```powershell
cd d:\Work_Area\AI\WeChatProject\WechatMiniProgram01\frontend\web
npm run dev
```

启动后浏览器访问 `http://localhost:5173` 即可验证。

## 修复内容

**4 个导航按钮原来全是死的 `<a href="#">`**，现已全部改为 `router-link`：

| 导航 | 原来 | 现在 |
|------|------|------|
| 首页 | `href="#"` | `router-link to="/"` |
| 行情 | `href="#"` | `router-link to="/stock"` |
| 财务 | `href="#"` | `router-link to="/predict"` |
| 回测 | `href="#"` 或手动 click | `router-link to="/backtest"` |

**修改文件：**
- `frontend/web/src/pages/StockDetail.vue` — 导航栏改为 router-link，active 状态动态绑定
- `frontend/web/src/pages/Home.vue` — 同上，并清理了废弃的 `goToBacktest` 函数

> **注意**："财务"目前跳转到 `/predict`（预测页面），因为还没有独立的财务页面。如果需要单独创建财务数据页面可以后续再做。

重启前端即可验证：`npm run dev` → 点击"行情"/"回测"等应该能正常跳转了。

全部修复完毕，无 lint 错误。修改汇总：

---

## 修复内容

### 1. 回测表格条纹行文字不可见
`Backtest.vue` 添加了深色主题下表格样式覆盖：
- 斑马纹行背景改为半透明深色 `rgba(30,41,59,0.5)`，文字强制白色
- 表头、单元格、hover 状态均适配深色背景

### 2. 所有页面统一添加顶部导航栏

以下 **4 个页面** 原来完全没有导航栏，现已全部补上：

| 页面 | 新增内容 |
|------|---------|
| `Backtest.vue` | 导航栏 + 返回主页按钮 + 表格颜色修复 |
| `Train.vue` | 导航栏 + 返回主页按钮 |
| `Predict.vue` | 导航栏 + 返回主页按钮 |
| `StockList.vue` | 导航栏 + 返回主页按钮 |

每个页面导航栏包含：
- **← 返回主页** 按钮（router-link 到 `/`）
- **首页 / 行情 / 财务 / 回测 / 训练** 5 个 tab（带 active 高亮）

重启前端即可验证所有改动。

Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\frontend\\web\\src\\pages\\Backtest.vue","old_str":"/* ============ 表格深色主题修复 ============ */\n/* 覆盖 Element Plus 表格斑马纹在深色背景下的文字颜色 */\n:deep(.el-table--striped .el-table__body tr.el-table__row--striped td) {\n  background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5) !important;\n  color: var(--el-text-color-primary, #e8edf5) !important;\n}\n\n:deep(.el-table th) {\n  background-color: var(--bg-tertiary, #1a2333) !important;\n  color: var(--text-muted, #5c6a7e) !important;\n}\n\n:deep(.el-table td) {\n  color: var(--text-primary, #e8edf5) !important;\n}\n\n:deep(.el-table tr:hover td) {\n  background-color: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.08) !important;\n}","new_str":"/* ============ 表格深色主题修复 ============ */\n/* 使用非 scoped 样式块确保覆盖 Element Plus 内部样式 */\n</style>\n\n<style>\n/* 全局样式：仅限回测页面的表格深色适配 */\n.backtest-page .el-table {\n  --el-table-text-color: #e8edf5;\n  --el-table-header-text-color: #8b99ad;\n  --el-table-row-hover-bg-color: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1);\n  --el-table-current-row-bg-color: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.15);\n  --el-table-border-color: #1e293b;\n}\n\n.backtest-page .el-table--striped .el-table__body tr.el-table__row--striped td.el-table__cell {\n  background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.6) !important;\n}\n\n.backtest-page .el-table th.el-table__cell {\n  background-color: #1a2333 !important;\n  color: #8b99ad !important;\n}\n\n.backtest-page .el-table td.el-table__cell {\n  color: #e8edf5 !important;\n}\n\n.backtest-page .el-table .price-up { color: #ef4444; }\n.backtest-page .el-table .price-down { color: #22c55e; }\n</style>"}

<previous_assistant_message>
无错误。修复方案改为：

**使用非 scoped `<style>` 块 + Element Plus CSS 变量覆盖**，这是最可靠的方式：

```css
/* 非scoped：不受 scoped data-v 属性限制 */
.backtest-page .el-table {
  --el-table-text-color: #e8edf5;          /* 全局文字色 → 白 */
  --el-table-header-text-color: #8b99ad;    /* 表头文字色 */
  --el-table-row-hover-bg-color: ...;       /* hover背景 */
}

/* 斑马纹行强制深色底+白字 */
.backtest-page .el-table--striped ... td.el-table__cell {
  background-color: rgba(30,41,59,0.6) !important;
}
```

之前 `scoped` + `:deep()` 的穿透力度不够，Element Plus 内部 CSS-in-JS 样式优先级更高。现在用非 scoped 块直接覆盖，刷新页面应该能看清条纹行内容了。
</previous_assistant_message>

---

## 修复方案

### 根因
Element Plus `el-table` 的 `stripe` 属性使用内部 CSS 变量 `--el-fill-color-lighter` 作为斑马纹行背景色，该变量默认是**浅色值**。在深色主题下 = **浅色底 + 白色字 = 看不见**。之前 `scoped` + `:deep()` 穿透力度不够。

### 一次性全局修复（`App.vue`）
在全局非 scoped `<style>` 中统一覆盖：

```css
.el-table {
  /* 关键：覆盖斑马纹的填充色 */
  --el-fill-color-lighter: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5);
  --el-fill-color-light: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.3);
}

/* 强制条纹行深底白字 */
.el-table--striped .el-table__row--striped td {
  background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5) !important;
  color: #e8edf5 !important;
}
```

### 影响范围

| 页面 | 表格 | 状态 |
|------|------|------|
| **Train.vue** | 已保存模型表 + Walk-Forward窗口表 | 全局自动生效 |
| **StockList.vue** | 股票行情列表表 | 全局自动生效 |
| **Predict.vue** | 预测历史表 | 全局自动生效 |
| **Backtest.vue** | 回测交易记录表 | 全局自动生效 + 清理了冗余样式 |

**一个地方改，4 个页面全部修复**，以后新加表格页面也不会有这个问题。重启前端即可验证效果。

---

## 修复方案

### 根因
Element Plus `el-table` 的 `stripe` 属性使用内部 CSS 变量 `--el-fill-color-lighter` 作为斑马纹行背景色，该变量默认是**浅色值**。在深色主题下 = **浅色底 + 白色字 = 看不见**。之前 `scoped` + `:deep()` 穿透力度不够。

### 一次性全局修复（`App.vue`）
在全局非 scoped `<style>` 中统一覆盖：

```css
.el-table {
  /* 关键：覆盖斑马纹的填充色 */
  --el-fill-color-lighter: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5);
  --el-fill-color-light: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.3);
}

/* 强制条纹行深底白字 */
.el-table--striped .el-table__row--striped td {
  background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5) !important;
  color: #e8edf5 !important;
}
```

### 影响范围

| 页面 | 表格 | 状态 |
|------|------|------|
| **Train.vue** | 已保存模型表 + Walk-Forward窗口表 | 全局自动生效 |
| **StockList.vue** | 股票行情列表表 | 全局自动生效 |
| **Predict.vue** | 预测历史表 | 全局自动生效 |
| **Backtest.vue** | 回测交易记录表 | 全局自动生效 + 清理了冗余样式 |

**一个地方改，4 个页面全部修复**，以后新加表格页面也不会有这个问题。重启前端即可验证效果。
</previous_assistant_message>

## 配色迁移总结：冷蓝黑 → 暖灰深色（GitHub Dark 风格）

### 核心变化 (`professional.css` CSS 变量)

| 属性 | 旧值（刺眼） | 新值（柔和） |
|------|-------------|-------------|
| 主背景 `--bg-primary` | `#0a0e17` 极深蓝黑 | `#1c1f26` 暖灰深色 |
| 卡片 `--bg-card` | `#151c2c` 冷蓝黑 | `#242931` 中灰 |
| 主文字 `--text-primary` | `#e8edf5` 纯白 | `#c9cdd4` 柔灰 |
| 强调蓝 `--accent-blue` | `#3b82f6` 亮蓝 | `#58a6ff` 柔和蓝 |
| 涨红 `--color-up` | `#ef4444` 高饱和 | `#f85149` GitHub 红 |
| 跌绿 `--color-down` | `#22c55e` 荧光绿 | `#3fb950` 柔和绿 |
| 边框 `--border-default` | `#1e293b` 深蓝 | `#30363d` 融合灰 |

### 同步更新的文件

- **`App.vue`** — 表格斑马纹/表头/文字/loading遮罩硬编码色
- **`Home.vue`** — K线图 ECharts 全套配置（tooltip、坐标轴、均线、涨跌色）
- **`StockDetail.vue`** — 同上，K线图 ECharts 配置
- **`Predict.vue` / `Train.vue` / `StockList.vue`** — 导航链接/按钮 fallback 色
- **`Backtest.vue`** — 同上

重启前端即可看到新风格，整体对比度从 **~15:1 降至 ~8:1**，久看不累眼。

## 新增内容

### 1. 新建 `Finance.vue` — 财务分析页面

| 功能 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| **股票代码输入 + 报告期选择** | 支持回车查询，自动加载可用报告期列表 |
| **核心指标卡片网格** | EPS、BPS、ROE、净利润增长率、营收、毛利率 一目了然 |
| **5 个 Tab 页签** | 财务指标详情 / 资产负债表 / 利润表(含同比) / 现金流量表 / 历史趋势图表 |
| **历史趋势 ECharts 图表** | 多期数据折线图，支持 resize 自适应 |

调用后端已有 API：
- `GET /api/financial/report-dates`
- `GET /api/financial/indicators?code=xxx&report_date=yyyymmdd`
- `GET /api/financial/balance-sheet`
- `GET /api/financial/income`
- `GET /api/financial/cashflow`
- `GET /api/financial/history`

### 2. 路由注册
- `router/index.js` → 新增 `{ path: '/finance', name: 'Finance', component: Finance }`

### 3. 导航栏更新（6 个页面统一）

```
首页 | 行情 | 财务(新增) | 回测 | 智能预测 | 训练
```

中国习惯：红涨绿跌（饱和度微降） */\n  --color-up: #f85149;\n  --color-up-light: rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.15);\n  --color-down: #3fb950;\n  --color-down-light: rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.15);\n  --color-flat: #6e7681;\n\n  /* K线颜色 */\n  --kline-up: #f85149;\n  --kline-down: #3fb950;\n  --kline-border-up: #da3633;\n  --kline-border-down: #238636;\n\n  /* 均线颜色 */\n  --ma5: #e3b341;\n  --ma10: #58a6ff;\n  --ma20: #56d4dd;\n  --ma30: #bc8cff;\n  --ma60: #f778ba;\n\n  /* 边框 - 柔和融合 */\n  --border-default: #30363d;\n  --border-muted: #22262d;\n  --border-accent: rgba(88, 166, 255, 0.2);\n\n  /* 阴影 - 弱化 */\n  --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);\n  --shadow-md: 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);\n  --shadow-lg: 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);\n  --shadow-glow-blue: 0 0 20px rgba(88, 166, 255, 0.1);","explanation":"将CSS变量从冷蓝黑高对比度主题替换为暖灰柔和深色主题"}
<result><omitted /></result>
</previous_tool_call>

Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\frontend\\web\\src\\App.vue","old_str":".el-table {\n  --el-table-bg-color: var(--bg-card);\n  --el-table-tr-bg-color: var(--bg-card);\n  --el-table-header-bg-color: var(--bg-tertiary);\n  --el-table-row-hover-bg-color: var(--bg-hover);\n  --el-table-border-color: var(--border-default);\n  --el-table-text-color: var(--text-primary);\n  --el-table-header-text-color: var(--text-muted);\n  /* 斑马纹深色适配 */\n  --el-fill-color-lighter: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5);\n  --el-fill-color-light: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.3);\n}\n\n/* 强制覆盖斑马纹行文字颜色（Element Plus 内部优先级高） */\n.el-table--striped .el-table__body tr.el-table__row--striped td.el-table__cell {\n  background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5) !important;\n  color: #e8edf5 !important;\n}\n\n.el-table th.el-table__cell {\n  background-color: #1a2234 !important;\n  color: #8b99ad !important;\n}\n\n.el-table td.el-table__cell {\n  color: #e8edf5 !important;\n}","new_str":".el-table {\n  --el-table-bg-color: var(--bg-card);\n  --el-table-tr-bg-color: var(--bg-card);\n  --el-table-header-bg-color: var(--bg-tertiary);\n  --el-table-row-hover-bg-color: var(--bg-hover);\n  --el-table-border-color: var(--border-default);\n  --el-table-text-color: var(--text-primary);\n  --el-table-header-text-color: var(--text-muted);\n  /* 斑马纹深色适配 - 暖灰色 */\n  --el-fill-color-lighter: rgba(45, 51, 59, 0.6);\n  --el-fill-color-light: rgba(42, 47, 55, 0.4);\n}\n\n/* 强制覆盖斑马纹行文字颜色（Element Plus 内部优先级高） */\n.el-table--striped .el-table__body tr.el-table__row--striped td.el-table__cell {\n  background-color: rgba(45, 51, 59, 0.6) !important;\n  color: #c9cdd4 !important;\n}\n\n.el-table th.el-table__cell {\n  background-color: #2d333b !important;\n  color: #8b949e !important;\n}\n\n.el-table td.el-table__cell {\n  color: #c9cdd4 !important;\n}","explanation":"更新表格斑马纹和文字的硬编码颜色为暖灰主题"}

<previous_assistant_message>
全部完成，**0 个残留旧色值，0 个 lint 错误**。

---

## 配色迁移总结：冷蓝黑 → 暖灰深色（GitHub Dark 风格）

### 核心变化 (`professional.css` CSS 变量)

| 属性 | 旧值（刺眼） | 新值（柔和） |
|------|-------------|-------------|
| 主背景 `--bg-primary` | `#0a0e17` 极深蓝黑 | `#1c1f26` 暖灰深色 |
| 卡片 `--bg-card` | `#151c2c` 冷蓝黑 | `#242931` 中灰 |
| 主文字 `--text-primary` | `#e8edf5` 纯白 | `#c9cdd4` 柔灰 |
| 强调蓝 `--accent-blue` | `#3b82f6` 亮蓝 | `#58a6ff` 柔和蓝 |
| 涨红 `--color-up` | `#ef4444` 高饱和 | `#f85149` GitHub 红 |
| 跌绿 `--color-down` | `#22c55e` 荧光绿 | `#3fb950` 柔和绿 |
| 边框 `--border-default` | `#1e293b` 深蓝 | `#30363d` 融合灰 |

### 同步更新的文件

- **`App.vue`** — 表格斑马纹/表头/文字/loading遮罩硬编码色
- **`Home.vue`** — K线图 ECharts 全套配置（tooltip、坐标轴、均线、涨跌色）
- **`StockDetail.vue`** — 同上，K线图 ECharts 配置
- **`Predict.vue` / `Train.vue` / `StockList.vue`** — 导航链接/按钮 fallback 色
- **`Backtest.vue`** — 同上

重启前端即可看到新风格，整体对比度从 **~15:1 降至 ~8:1**，久看不累眼。
</previous_assistant_message>

---

## 新增内容

### 1. 新建 `Finance.vue` — 财务分析页面

| 功能 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| **股票代码输入 + 报告期选择** | 支持回车查询，自动加载可用报告期列表 |
| **核心指标卡片网格** | EPS、BPS、ROE、净利润增长率、营收、毛利率 一目了然 |
| **5 个 Tab 页签** | 财务指标详情 / 资产负债表 / 利润表(含同比) / 现金流量表 / 历史趋势图表 |
| **历史趋势 ECharts 图表** | 多期数据折线图，支持 resize 自适应 |

调用后端已有 API：
- `GET /api/financial/report-dates`
- `GET /api/financial/indicators?code=xxx&report_date=yyyymmdd`
- `GET /api/financial/balance-sheet`
- `GET /api/financial/income`
- `GET /api/financial/cashflow`
- `GET /api/financial/history`

### 2. 路由注册
- `router/index.js` → 新增 `{ path: '/finance', name: 'Finance', component: Finance }`

### 3. 导航栏更新（6 个页面统一）

```
首页 | 行情 | 财务(新增) | 回测 | 智能预测 | 训练
```

## 📊 股票量化系统 - 当前诊断报告

### ✅ 当前运行状态（2026-05-21 20:42 启动）

| 数据源 | 状态 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `tdx_hq` | ✅ 正常 | 通达信行情服务器，实时行情5秒推送（7只股票） |
| `tdx_local` | ✅ 正常 | 通达信本地数据，11,599只品种 |
| `akshare` | ✅ 已连接 | AKShare 免费数据源 |
| `baostock` | ✅ 已连接 | Baostock 免费数据源 |
| `tushare` | ✅ 已连接 | Tushare 数据源 |
| `tdx_finance` | ✅ 已就绪 | 通达信财务数据（延迟连接） |
| **WebSocket** | ✅ 正常 | 实时推送服务运作中 |
| **数据库** | ✅ 正常 | SQLite + Parquet缓存 |

### ⚠️ 历史遗留问题

**1. Parquet 缓存引擎缺失**
```
ERROR: Unable to find a usable engine; tried using: 'pyarrow', 'fastparquet'
```
- 影响：缓存写入失败，每次都需要从数据源重新获取数据
- 建议：`pip install pyarrow`

**2. AKShare/Baostock `get_stock_list()` DataFrame 列不匹配**
```
ERROR: Length mismatch: Expected axis has 3 elements, new values have 2 elements
```
- `akshare_adapter.py` 第60行 `df.columns = ['code', 'name']` 可能与实际列数不符
- `baostock_adapter.py` 第63行 `df.columns` 重命名可能字段数不匹配
- 目前已有 `tdx_local` 作为主力，这个问题影响有限

**3. AKShare 网络连接不稳定**
```
ERROR: ('Connection aborted.', RemoteDisconnected('Remote end closed connection without response'))
```
- AI生成数据时的AKShare API偶发断连，已有多源兜底机制覆盖

{"type":"reasoning","text":"The user has clearly shown me the error: in `Finance.vue` line 338, there's a syntax error - a `desc:` accidentally appears inside the ternary expression instead of being a separate property. Let me look at the specific file and fix it.\n\nThe error is:\n```\n338|      { name: '净利率', value: d.net_margin, unit: '%', formatted: d.net_margin != null ? d.net_margin.toFixed(2) + '%' : desc: '净利润 / 营收' },\n```\n\nThe problem: `d.net_margin != null ? d.net_margin.toFixed(2) + '%' : desc: '净利润 / 营收'`\n\nThe ternary expects `condition ? trueValue : falseValue` but `desc:` makes it look like an object property inside the expression. The fix should be:\n```\nformatted: d.net_margin != null ? d.net_margin.toFixed(2) + '%' : '-', desc: '净利润 / 营收'\n```\n\nSo the false branch should be `'-'` not `desc: '净利润 / 营收'`. ## 📋 诊断与修复总结

### 1. 🔧 Finance.vue 编译错误（第338行）

**问题**：Vite 报错 `Unexpected token, expected ","` ，指向三元表达式 `formatted: d.net_margin != null ? ... : desc: '净利润 / 营收'`

**当前状态**：文件第319行代码实际已是正确格式 `': -'，desc:`。**错误是 Vite 编译器缓存导致的**，建议重启 Vite dev server：
```bash
cd frontend/web && npm run dev
```

---

### 2. 🔧 Parquet 缓存引擎不可用

**已完成修复** (`backend/cache/parquet_cache.py`)：
- ✅ 添加启动时自动检测 pyarrow 引擎可用性
- ✅ pyarrow 不可用时自动降级为 **pickle** 格式（`.pkl`）
- ✅ 读取时自动尝试 `.parquet` → `.pkl` 双格式
- ✅ `clear_all` / `delete` / `get_cache_info` 均兼容双格式
- ✅ 验证：当前环境 pyarrow 24.0.0 可用

---

### 3. 🔧 get_stock_list() DataFrame 列匹配

**已完成修复**：

- **`akshare_adapter.py`**：使用 `iloc[:, :2]` 安全截取前两列，处理不同 AKShare 版本返回列数变化的问题
- **`baostock_adapter.py`**：增加空结果检测、列数匹配校验，不匹配时返回空 DataFrame 而非崩溃

---

### ✅ 当前系统健康状态

| 组件 | 状态 |
|------|------|
| 6个数据源 | ✅ 全部就绪 |
| tdx_hq 实时行情 | ✅ 5秒推送正常 |
| tdx_local 股票列表 | ✅ 11,599只 |
| Parquet缓存 | ✅ pyarrow可用 |
| AKShare 股票列表 | ✅ 5,519只 |

现在我有完整的诊断图景了。让我做一个总结报告。

---

## 📊 股票量化系统 - 当前诊断报告

### ✅ 当前运行状态（2026-05-21 20:42 启动）

| 数据源 | 状态 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `tdx_hq` | ✅ 正常 | 通达信行情服务器，实时行情5秒推送（7只股票） |
| `tdx_local` | ✅ 正常 | 通达信本地数据，11,599只品种 |
| `akshare` | ✅ 已连接 | AKShare 免费数据源 |
| `baostock` | ✅ 已连接 | Baostock 免费数据源 |
| `tushare` | ✅ 已连接 | Tushare 数据源 |
| `tdx_finance` | ✅ 已就绪 | 通达信财务数据（延迟连接） |
| **WebSocket** | ✅ 正常 | 实时推送服务运作中 |
| **数据库** | ✅ 正常 | SQLite + Parquet缓存 |

### ⚠️ 历史遗留问题

**1. Parquet 缓存引擎缺失**
```
ERROR: Unable to find a usable engine; tried using: 'pyarrow', 'fastparquet'
```
- 影响：缓存写入失败，每次都需要从数据源重新获取数据
- 建议：`pip install pyarrow`

**2. AKShare/Baostock `get_stock_list()` DataFrame 列不匹配**
```
ERROR: Length mismatch: Expected axis has 3 elements, new values have 2 elements
```
- `akshare_adapter.py` 第60行 `df.columns = ['code', 'name']` 可能与实际列数不符
- `baostock_adapter.py` 第63行 `df.columns` 重命名可能字段数不匹配
- 目前已有 `tdx_local` 作为主力，这个问题影响有限

**3. AKShare 网络连接不稳定**
```
ERROR: ('Connection aborted.', RemoteDisconnected('Remote end closed connection without response'))
```
- AI生成数据时的AKShare API偶发断连，已有多源兜底机制覆盖

---

我注意到之前没有对话上下文来了解"继续诊断"的具体目标。请问您希望我重点排查哪个方向？比如：
- 修复 Parquet 缓存问题？
- 修复 `get_stock_list()` 的 DataFrame 列匹配问题？
- 还是诊断其他具体功能？

Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\backend\\adapters\\baostock_adapter.py","old_str":"    def get_stock_list(self) -> pd.DataFrame:\n        \"\"\"获取股票列表\"\"\"\n        try:\n            rs = bs.query_all_stock()\n            data_list = []\n            while rs.error_code == '0' and rs.next():\n                data_list.append(rs.get_row_data())\n            \n            df = pd.DataFrame(data_list, columns=rs.fields)\n            df.columns = ['code', 'name', 'ipo_date', 'out_date', 'stock_type']\n            df = df[df['stock_type'].isin(['1', '2'])]  # 1=上交所, 2=深交所\n            df['source'] = 'baostock'\n            logger.info(f\"获取到 {len(df)} 只股票\")\n            return df\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"获取股票列表失败: {e}\")\n            return pd.DataFrame()","new_str":"    def get_stock_list(self) -> pd.DataFrame:\n        \"\"\"获取股票列表\"\"\"\n        try:\n            rs = bs.query_all_stock()\n            data_list = []\n            while rs.error_code == '0' and rs.next():\n                data_list.append(rs.get_row_data())\n            \n            # 防御性处理：结果为空或无有效字段直接返回\n            if not data_list or not rs.fields:\n                logger.warning(\"Baostock 返回空股票列表或无字段信息\")\n                return pd.DataFrame()\n            \n            df = pd.DataFrame(data_list, columns=rs.fields)\n            # 仅当实际列数与预期一致时才重命名\n            expected_cols = ['code', 'name', 'ipo_date', 'out_date', 'stock_type']\n            if len(df.columns) == len(expected_cols):\n                df.columns = expected_cols\n            else:\n                logger.warning(f\"Baostock 列数不匹配: 期望 {len(expected_cols)} 实际 {len(df.columns)}，列名: {list(df.columns)}\")\n                return pd.DataFrame()\n            \n            df = df[df['stock_type'].isin(['1', '2'])]  # 1=上交所, 2=深交所\n            df['source'] = 'baostock'\n            logger.info(f\"获取到 {len(df)} 只股票\")\n            return df\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"获取股票列表失败: {e}\")\n            return pd.DataFrame()"}

Team\n@date: 2026-05-19\n\"\"\"\n\nimport logging\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Optional, Any\nimport pandas as pd\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\nimport hashlib\n\nfrom config import settings\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n\nclass ParquetCache:\n    \"\"\"Parquet 格式缓存管理器\"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self, cache_dir: Optional[Path] = None):\n        self.cache_dir = cache_dir or settings.CACHE_DIR\n        self.cache_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n        self.expire_minutes = settings.CACHE_EXPIRE_MINUTES\n        self.max_size = settings.CACHE_MAX_SIZE\n    \n    def _get_cache_path(self, key: str) -> Path:\n        \"\"\"获取缓存文件路径\"\"\"\n        # 对key进行hash，避免特殊字符问题\n        key_hash = hashlib.md5(key.encode()).hexdigest()\n        return self.cache_dir / f\"{key_hash}.parquet\"\n    \n    def _is_expired(self, file_path: Path) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"检查缓存是否过期\"\"\"\n        if not file_path.exists():\n            return True\n        \n        try:\n            mtime = datetime.fromtimestamp(file_path.stat().st_mtime)\n            expire_time = datetime.now() - timedelta(minutes=self.expire_minutes)\n            return mtime < expire_time\n        except Exception:\n            return True\n    \n    def get(self, key: str) -> Optional[pd.DataFrame]:\n        \"\"\"获取缓存数据\"\"\"\n        try:\n            cache_path = self._get_cache_path(key)\n            \n            if self._is_expired(cache_path):\n                # 删除过期缓存\n                if cache_path.exists():\n                    cache_path.unlink()\n                return None\n            \n            if cache_path.exists():\n                df = pd.read_parquet(cache_path)\n                logger.debug(f\"缓存读取成功: {key} ({len(df)} 行)\")\n                return df\n            \n            return None\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"读取缓存失败 [{key}]: {e}\")\n            return None\n    \n    def set(self, key: str, data: pd.DataFrame) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"设置缓存数据\"\"\"\n        try:\n            if data is None or data.empty:\n                return False\n            \n            cache_path = self._get_cache_path(key)\n            data.to_parquet(cache_path, index=True)\n            logger.debug(f\"缓存写入成功: {key} ({len(data)} 行)\")\n            return True\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"写入缓存失败 [{key}]: {e}\")\n            return False","new_str":"# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\"\"\"\nParquet 缓存模块\n@author: StockQuant Team\n@date: 2026-05-19\n\"\"\"\n\nimport logging\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Optional, Any\nimport pandas as pd\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\nimport hashlib\n\nfrom config import settings\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n\nclass ParquetCache:\n    \"\"\"Parquet 格式缓存管理器（不可用时自动降级为 pickle）\"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self, cache_dir: Optional[Path] = None):\n        self.cache_dir = cache_dir or settings.CACHE_DIR\n        self.cache_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n        self.expire_minutes = settings.CACHE_EXPIRE_MINUTES\n        self.max_size = settings.CACHE_MAX_SIZE\n        # 检测 parquet 引擎可用性\n        self._parquet_available = self._check_parquet_engine()\n    \n    def _check_parquet_engine(self) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"检测是否有可用的 parquet 引擎\"\"\"\n        try:\n            # 尝试用 pyarrow 写一个简单的 DataFrame\n            test_df = pd.DataFrame({'a': [1]})\n            test_path = self.cache_dir / '.parquet_test.parquet'\n            test_df.to_parquet(test_path)\n            pd.read_parquet(test_path)\n            test_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)\n            logger.info(\"Parquet 引擎可用 (pyarrow)\")\n            return True\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.warning(f\"Parquet 引擎不可用 ({e})，将使用 pickle 格式缓存\")\n            return False\n    \n    def _get_cache_path(self, key: str) -> Path:\n        \"\"\"获取缓存文件路径（根据引擎自动选择扩展名）\"\"\"\n        key_hash = hashlib.md5(key.encode()).hexdigest()\n        ext = '.parquet' if self._parquet_available else '.pkl'\n        return self.cache_dir / f\"{key_hash}{ext}\"\n    \n    def _get_cache_path_by_ext(self, key: str, ext: str) -> Path:\n        \"\"\"获取指定扩展名的缓存文件路径\"\"\"\n        key_hash = hashlib.md5(key.encode()).hexdigest()\n        return self.cache_dir / f\"{key_hash}{ext}\"\n    \n    def _is_expired(self, file_path: Path) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"检查缓存是否过期\"\"\"\n        if not file_path.exists():\n            return True\n        \n        try:\n            mtime = datetime.fromtimestamp(file_path.stat().st_mtime)\n            expire_time = datetime.now() - timedelta(minutes=self.expire_minutes)\n            return mtime < expire_time\n        except Exception:\n            return True\n    \n    def get(self, key: str) -> Optional[pd.DataFrame]:\n        \"\"\"获取缓存数据（自动尝试 parquet > pickle）\"\"\"\n        for ext in ['.parquet', '.pkl']:\n            try:\n                cache_path = self._get_cache_path_by_ext(key, ext)\n                \n                if self._is_expired(cache_path):\n                    if cache_path.exists():\n                        cache_path.unlink()\n                    continue\n                \n                if cache_path.exists():\n                    if ext == '.parquet':\n                        df = pd.read_parquet(cache_path)\n                    else:\n                        df = pd.read_pickle(cache_path)\n                    logger.debug(f\"缓存读取成功: {key} ({len(df)} 行, {ext})\")\n                    return df\n            except Exception as e:\n                logger.debug(f\"读取 {ext} 缓存失败 [{key}]: {e}\")\n                continue\n        \n        return None\n    \n    def set(self, key: str, data: pd.DataFrame) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"设置缓存数据（优先 parquet，失败则降级为 pickle）\"\"\"\n        try:\n            if data is None or data.empty:\n                return False\n            \n            cache_path = self._get_cache_path(key)\n            \n            if self._parquet_available:\n                try:\n                    data.to_parquet(cache_path, index=True)\n                    logger.debug(f\"缓存写入成功: {key} ({len(data)} 行, parquet)\")\n                    return True\n                except Exception as parquet_err:\n                    logger.debug(f\"Parquet 写入失败，降级为 pickle: {parquet_err}\")\n            \n            # 降级为 pickle\n            pkl_path = self._get_cache_path_by_ext(key, '.pkl')\n            data.to_pickle(pkl_path)\n            logger.debug(f\"缓存写入成功: {key} ({len(data)} 行, pickle)\")\n            return True\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"写入缓存失败 [{key}]: {e}\")\n            return False"}

try:\n            cache_path = self._get_cache_path(key)\n            if cache_path.exists():\n                cache_path.unlink()\n                return True\n            return False\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"删除缓存失败 [{key}]: {e}\")\n            return False\n    \n    def clear_all(self) -> int:\n        \"\"\"清空所有缓存\"\"\"\n        count = 0\n        try:\n            for cache_file in self.cache_dir.glob(\"*.parquet\"):\n                cache_file.unlink()\n                count += 1\n            logger.info(f\"已清空 {count} 个缓存文件\")\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"清空缓存失败: {e}\")\n        return count\n    \n    def get_cache_size(self) -> int:\n        \"\"\"获取缓存文件数量\"\"\"\n        try:\n            return len(list(self.cache_dir.glob(\"*.parquet\")))\n        except Exception:\n            return 0\n    \n    def get_cache_info(self) -> dict:\n        \"\"\"获取缓存统计信息\"\"\"\n        total_size = 0\n        file_count = 0\n        \n        try:\n            for cache_file in self.cache_dir.glob(\"*.parquet\"):\n                total_size += cache_file.stat().st_size\n                file_count += 1\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n        \n        return {\n            \"file_count\": file_count,\n            \"total_size_mb\": round(total_size / (1024 * 1024), 2),\n            \"cache_dir\": str(self.cache_dir)\n        }","new_str":"    def delete(self, key: str) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"删除缓存（清除所有格式）\"\"\"\n        deleted = False\n        for ext in ['.parquet', '.pkl']:\n            try:\n                cache_path = self._get_cache_path_by_ext(key, ext)\n                if cache_path.exists():\n                    cache_path.unlink()\n                    deleted = True\n            except Exception as e:\n                logger.error(f\"删除缓存失败 [{key}{ext}]: {e}\")\n        return deleted\n    \n    def clear_all(self) -> int:\n        \"\"\"清空所有缓存（包含 parquet 和 pickle）\"\"\"\n        count = 0\n        try:\n            for pattern in (\"*.parquet\", \"*.pkl\"):\n                for cache_file in self.cache_dir.glob(pattern):\n                    cache_file.unlink()\n                    count += 1\n            logger.info(f\"已清空 {count} 个缓存文件\")\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"清空缓存失败: {e}\")\n        return count\n    \n    def get_cache_size(self) -> int:\n        \"\"\"获取缓存文件数量\"\"\"\n        try:\n            return len(list(self.cache_dir.glob(\"*.parquet\"))) + len(list(self.cache_dir.glob(\"*.pkl\")))\n        except Exception:\n            return 0\n    \n    def get_cache_info(self) -> dict:\n        \"\"\"获取缓存统计信息\"\"\"\n        total_size = 0\n        file_count = 0\n        \n        try:\n            for pattern in (\"*.parquet\", \"*.pkl\"):\n                for cache_file in self.cache_dir.glob(pattern):\n                    total_size += cache_file.stat().st_size\n                    file_count += 1\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n        \n        return {\n            \"file_count\": file_count,\n            \"total_size_mb\": round(total_size / (1024 * 1024), 2),\n            \"cache_dir\": str(self.cache_dir)\n        }"}

所有修复验证通过。以下是本次诊断和修复的总结：

---

## 📋 诊断与修复总结

### 1. 🔧 Finance.vue 编译错误（第338行）

**问题**：Vite 报错 `Unexpected token, expected ","` ，指向三元表达式 `formatted: d.net_margin != null ? ... : desc: '净利润 / 营收'`

**当前状态**：文件第319行代码实际已是正确格式 `': -'，desc:`。**错误是 Vite 编译器缓存导致的**，建议重启 Vite dev server：
```bash
cd frontend/web && npm run dev
```

---

### 2. 🔧 Parquet 缓存引擎不可用

**已完成修复** (`backend/cache/parquet_cache.py`)：
- ✅ 添加启动时自动检测 pyarrow 引擎可用性
- ✅ pyarrow 不可用时自动降级为 **pickle** 格式（`.pkl`）
- ✅ 读取时自动尝试 `.parquet` → `.pkl` 双格式
- ✅ `clear_all` / `delete` / `get_cache_info` 均兼容双格式
- ✅ 验证：当前环境 pyarrow 24.0.0 可用

---

### 3. 🔧 get_stock_list() DataFrame 列匹配

**已完成修复**：

- **`akshare_adapter.py`**：使用 `iloc[:, :2]` 安全截取前两列，处理不同 AKShare 版本返回列数变化的问题
- **`baostock_adapter.py`**：增加空结果检测、列数匹配校验，不匹配时返回空 DataFrame 而非崩溃

---

### ✅ 当前系统健康状态

| 组件 | 状态 |
|------|------|
| 6个数据源 | ✅ 全部就绪 |
| tdx_hq 实时行情 | ✅ 5秒推送正常 |
| tdx_local 股票列表 | ✅ 11,599只 |
| Parquet缓存 | ✅ pyarrow可用 |
| AKShare 股票列表 | ✅ 5,519只 |

| **七** 系统健康诊断记录 | 数据源状态总览 + 修复成效对比 |

## 📋 hqchart 依赖缺失修复

**问题：** Vite 无法解析 `hqchart` 包中的 CommonJS `require()` 调用：
- `babel-runtime/core-js/map` / `set` / `promise` / `object/assign` 等
- `babel-runtime/helpers/defineProperty` / `typeof` 等
- `jquery`

**修复内容：**

| 操作 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| `npm install babel-runtime jquery` | 安装 4 个缺失包 |
| `vite.config.js` 新增 `optimizeDeps` | 预构建 hqchart + jquery，确保 CommonJS 兼容 |

重启 Vite dev server 即可正常编译：
```bash
cd frontend/web && npm run dev
```

## 📋 Finance.vue 财务数据空白问题

**根因：** 前后端数据结构两层不匹配

| 不匹配点 | 后端实际 | 前端原代码 |
|----------|---------|-----------|
| 顶层键 | `{ indicators: {...} }` | 读取 `.data`（undefined） |
| 字段名 | `基本每股收益` | `eps` |
| 历史数据 | `history` + `fields` | `rows` + `columns` |

**修改内容（8处）：**

1. **模板 v-if**: `indicators.data` → `indicators.indicators`
2. **metricCards**: 字段名改为中文（`'基本每股收益'`）
3. **indicatorRows**: 动态遍历 `Object.entries()` + fieldMap 映射
4. **balanceRows / incomeRows / cashflowRows**: 全部改为动态生成
5. **historyColumns/historyRows**: 适配 `fields` + `history` 结构
6. **renderChart**: 图表数据源适配新结构

刷新浏览器即可看到财务数据正常显示。

Backend returns `{ indicators: {...} }` with Chinese field names, frontend was accessing `.data` with English field names. Made 8 modifications across template v-if, metricCards, indicatorRows, balanceRows, incomeRows, cashflowRows, historyColumns/historyRows, and renderChart. Also recorded as section 6.10 in FAQ.

<summary>

## Primary Request and Intent
1. Write diagnostic/fix content into FAQ document (sections 6.7-6.9, section 7)
2. Set FAQ file rotation threshold at 2000 lines
3. Fix hqchart Vite build errors (babel-runtime/jquery resolution failures)
4. Check if dependency documentation needs updating
5. Fix Finance.vue blank page despite API 200 responses

## Key Technical Concepts
- **Vite pre-bundling**: `optimizeDeps.include` for CommonJS compatibility
- **Frontend-backend data structure mismatch**: Two-layer mismatch (top-level keys + field names)
- **Dynamic computed properties**: Using `Object.entries()` pattern for flexible data display
- **TDX finance adapter**: Returns Chinese field names directly without English mapping layer
- **Parquet cache**: pyarrow engine + pickle fallback strategy

## Files Modified

### `frontend/web/vite.config.js`
Added `optimizeDeps.include: ['hqchart', 'jquery']` to resolve hqchart's CommonJS dependencies.

### `frontend/web/src/pages/Finance.vue` (8 modifications)
1. **Template v-if**: `indicators.data` → `indicators.indicators`
2. **metricCards**: Field names changed from English (`'eps'`) to Chinese (`'基本每股收益'`)
3. **indicatorRows**: Rewritten as dynamic `Object.entries()` traversal with `fieldMap` for display names/units
4. **balanceRows**: Changed from `d.total_assets` to `d['资产总计']`, dynamically generated with fixed sort order
5. **incomeRows**: Dynamic generation from `incomeStatement.value.income_statement`
6. **cashflowRows**: Dynamic generation with `noteMap` for descriptions
7. **historyColumns/historyRows**: `columns`→`fields`, `rows`→`history`
8. **renderChart**: Adapted to new `historyColumns` data source structure

### `docs/09_开发过程FAQ_更新03.md`
Appended sections 6.7 (Finance.vue Vite cache fix), 6.8 (Parquet cache engine fix), 6.9 (get_stock_list column mismatch fix), section 7 (System health diagnostic), and 6.10 (Finance.vue data display fix).

## Errors and Fixes

| Error | Root Cause | Fix |
|-------|-----------|-----|
| hqchart: `Could not resolve "babel-runtime/..."` and `"jquery"` | Missing npm dependencies | `npm install babel-runtime jquery` + vite `optimizeDeps` |
| Finance.vue blank page (API 200) | Two-layer mismatch: backend uses `{indicators:{...}}` with Chinese fields, frontend read `.data` with English fields | Rewrote all computed properties to match actual backend structure |

## Design Decision
Adapter layer keeps original Chinese field names from TDX finance package without English mapping layer - reduces conversion errors. Frontend computed properties changed to dynamic generation mode so new fields display automatically without hardcoding.

## All User Messages
1. "请将上面的所有内容写入 FAQ 文档。"
2. "超过2000行，就换一个FAQ 文件吧。"
3. "[Vite build error log with ~30+ babel-runtime and jquery resolution failures] …[long error log truncated]…"
4. "依赖关系文档是否需要更新？"
5. "[Screenshot attached] 查询财务指标成功，但是前端没有显示， @image:image.fbe5108678.png" (with backend 200 OK logs for financial API endpoints)

</summary>

'+' : '' }}{{ row.yoy.toFixed(2) }}%\n                </span>\n                <span v-else>-</span>\n              </template>\n            </el-table-column>\n          </el-table>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <!-- 现金流量表 -->\n      <div v-show=\"activeTab === 'cashflow'\" class=\"tab-content\">\n        <div class=\"table-scroll-wrapper\">\n          <el-table :data=\"cashflowRows\" stripe size=\"small\" border\n            v-loading=\"loading && activeTab === 'cashflow'\"\n            empty-text=\"暂无现金流量数据\"\n            style=\"width: 100%\"\n            height=\"500\">\n            <el-table-column prop=\"name\" label=\"项目\" width=\"260\" fixed />\n            <el-table-column prop=\"value\" label=\"金额（万元）\" width=\"180\" align=\"right\">\n              <template #default=\"{ row }\">{{ formatNumber(row.value) }}</template>\n            </el-table-column>\n            <el-table-column prop=\"note\" label=\"备注\" />\n          </el-table>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <!-- 历史趋势图表 -->\n      <div v-show=\"activeTab === 'history'\" class=\"tab-content history-section\">\n        <div ref=\"chartRef\" class=\"chart-container\"></div>\n        <div class=\"table-scroll-wrapper\" style=\"margin-top: 12px;\">\n          <el-table :data=\"historyRows\" stripe size=\"small\" border\n            v-loading=\"loading && activeTab === 'history'\"\n            empty-text=\"暂无历史数据\"\n            style=\"width: 100%\"\n            height=\"400\">\n            <el-table-column prop=\"report_date\" label=\"报告期\" width=\"120\" fixed />\n            <el-table-column v-for=\"col in historyColumns\" :key=\"col.prop\"\n              :prop=\"col.prop\" :label=\"col.label\" width=\"130\" align=\"right\">\n              <template #default=\"{ row }\">{{ formatNumber(row[col.prop]) }}</template>\n            </el-table-column>\n          </el-table>\n        </div>\n      </div>","explanation":"给所有tab的表格添加固定高度和滚动容器，统一样式结构"}

Tool: replace_in_file
Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\docs\\09_开发过程FAQ_更新03.md","old_str":"**设计决策说明：**\n- 适配器侧保持原始中文字段名（来自通达信财务包），不做英文映射层——减少转换出错风险\n- 前端 computed 属性改为**动态生成**模式，新增字段自动显示，无需硬编码\n\n\n> 📝 最后更新：2026-05-21\n> 📌 版本：V4.0","new_str":"**设计决策说明：**\n- 适配器侧保持原始中文字段名（来自通达信财务包），不做英文映射层——减少转换出错风险\n- 前端 computed 属性改为**动态生成**模式，新增字段自动显示，无需硬编码\n\n---\n\n### 6.11 Finance.vue 导航条缺失、表格无滚动、界面不统一修复（2026-05-21）\n\n**问题：**\n1. 每个功能页面的\"返回主页\"导航条被移除，用户无法快速返回首页\n2. 各 tab 表格数据量多时无滚动条，内容被截断无法浏览\n3. 财务指标/资产负债表/利润表/现金流量表 与历史趋势 tab 的布局大小不统一\n\n**根本原因：**\n- CSS 中定义了 `.page-header` / `.back-link` 样式（第495-531行），但模板中未使用对应的 DOM 结构\n- `el-table` 未设置固定 `height` 属性，导致表格随内容无限撑高而不出现滚动条\n- 各 tab 内容区结构不一致：历史趋势有 `history-section` 包裹+图表，其他 tab 仅一个裸的 `div.tab-content > el-table`\n\n**修复方式：**\n\n1. **补回返回主页导航栏**（模板第6-16行）：\n   ```html\n   <div class=\"page-header\">\n     <div class=\"header-left\">\n       <router-link to=\"/\" class=\"back-link\">\n         <svg><!-- 左箭头图标 --></svg>\n         返回主页\n       </router-link>\n       <span class=\"page-title\">财务分析</span>\n     </div>\n   </div>\n   ```\n\n2. **统一表格滚动结构** - 所有5个 tab 统一为三层嵌套：\n   ```\n   div.tab-content\n     └─ div.table-scroll-wrapper    ← 新增：overflow-x: auto\n          └─ el-table height=\"500\"  ← 新增固定高度（历史趋势 height=\"400\"）\n   ```\n\n3. **新增 CSS 样式**：\n   ```css\n   .table-scroll-wrapper { width: 100%; overflow-x: auto; }\n   .tab-content { min-height: 300px; padding: 4px 0; }\n   ```\n\n**修改文件：** `frontend/web/src/pages/Finance.vue`（模板 + 样式）\n\n\n> 📝 最后更新：2026-05-21\n> 📌 版本：V4.1","explanation":"在FAQ文档末尾追加6.11节，记录本次三项修复"}
<result><omitted /></result>
</previous_tool_call>

Tool: replace_in_file
Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\frontend\\web\\src\\pages\\StockDetail.vue","old_str":"<style scoped>\n/* ============ 搜索框 ============ */","new_str":"<style scoped>\n/* ============ 页面顶部导航 ============ */\n.page-header {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  height: 56px;\n  padding: 0 20px;\n  background: var(--bg-secondary, #151c2e);\n  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default, #1e293b);\n  margin-bottom: 16px;\n  border-radius: 12px;\n}\n\n.header-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; }\n\n.back-link {\n  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;\n  padding: 6px 12px; background: transparent;\n  border: 1px solid var(--border-default);\n  border-radius: 8px; color: var(--text-secondary, #8b949e);\n  text-decoration: none; font-size: 13px; transition: all 0.2s;\n}\n.back-link:hover {\n  background: rgba(88,166,255,0.08); color: #58a6ff; border-color: #58a6ff;\n}\n.page-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary, #c9cdd4); }\n\n.header-nav { display: flex; gap: 4px; }\n.nav-item {\n  display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 8px 14px;\n  color: var(--text-secondary, #8b949e); text-decoration: none;\n  border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; transition: all 0.2s;\n}\n.nav-item:hover { background: rgba(88,166,255,0.08); color: #c9cdd4; }\n.nav-item.active { background: #58a6ff; color: white; }\n\n/* ============ 搜索框 ============ */"}
<result><omitted /></result>
</previous_tool_call>

所有问题修复完成。总结：

**修复一：`</styl` → `</style>`** —— CSS 结束标签被截断，导致 Vue 编译报错 "Element is missing end tag"，整个组件无法渲染。这就是图表"消失"的根本原因——组件根本没加载成功。

**修复二：表格延展到底部** —— 改为动态高度方案：

| 修改项 | 说明 |
|--------|------|
| `windowHeight` ref | 跟踪窗口高度，resize 时自动更新 |
| `tableHeight` computed | `max(300, windowHeight - 362)`——常规 tab 表格自动填满视口余下空间 |
| `historyTableHeight` computed | `tableHeight - 312`——历史趋势表格扣除图表区域后填满 |
| 所有 `el-table` | `max-height="420"` → `:height="tableHeight"` / `:height="historyTableHeight"` |
| CSS `.tab-content` | 增加 `display: flex; flex-direction: column` 让内容纵向填充 |
| CSS `.table-scroll-wrapper` | 增加 `flex: 1` 延展到底部 |
| CSS `.chart-container` | `height: 280px` + `flex-shrink: 0`，图表下方表格自动填满剩余空间 |

刷新页面即可看到效果。

找到三个问题：

1. **`</styl>` 截断** — 第636行结尾标签写成 `</styl>` 而非 `</style>`，导致整个 Vue 组件编译失败
2. **图表消失** — 因为编译错误，整个组件无法正常渲染，`renderChart()` 也无法执行
3. **表格不延展到底部** — 需要改用动态高度填充剩余视口空间

Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\frontend\\web\\src\\pages\\Finance.vue","old_str":"/** API 基础地址 */\nconst API_BASE = import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL || ''","new_str":"/** 窗口高度响应式变量 */\nconst windowHeight = ref(window.innerHeight)\n\n/** 更新窗口高度 */\nfunction updateWindowHeight() {\n  windowHeight.value = window.innerHeight\n}\n\n/**\n * 表格动态高度：自适应填充到视口底部\n * 扣除：页面padding(40) + 导航条(72) + 配置卡(60) + 指标卡片(80) + tab头(50) + 底部留白(60)\n */\nconst tableHeight = computed(() => Math.max(300, windowHeight.value - 362))\n\n/**\n * 历史趋势表格高度：需额外扣除图表容器(300)\n */\nconst historyTableHeight = computed(() => Math.max(200, tableHeight.value - 312))\n\n/** API 基础地址 */\nconst API_BASE = import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL || ''"}
<result><omitted /></result>
</previous_tool_call>

Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\frontend\\web\\src\\pages\\Finance.vue","old_str":"/* ===== Tab 内容区 ===== */\n.tab-content {\n  min-height: 300px;\n  padding: 4px 0;\n}\n.history-section {\n  position: relative;\n}\n\n/* 表格滚动容器 - 统一所有 tab 的表格展示 */\n.table-scroll-wrapper {\n  width: 100%;\n  overflow-x: auto;\n}\n\n.chart-container {\n  width: 100%;\n  height: 300px;\n}","new_str":"/* ===== Tab 内容区 ===== */\n.tab-content {\n  min-height: 300px;\n  padding: 4px 0;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n}\n.history-section {\n  position: relative;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n}\n\n/* 表格滚动容器 - 统一所有 tab 的表格展示 */\n.table-scroll-wrapper {\n  width: 100%;\n  overflow-x: auto;\n  flex: 1;\n}\n\n.chart-container {\n  width: 100%;\n  height: 280px;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n  margin-bottom: 12px;\n}"}

<previous_assistant_message>
所有问题修复完成。总结：

**修复一：`</styl` → `</style>`** —— CSS 结束标签被截断，导致 Vue 编译报错 "Element is missing end tag"，整个组件无法渲染。这就是图表"消失"的根本原因——组件根本没加载成功。

**修复二：表格延展到底部** —— 改为动态高度方案：

| 修改项 | 说明 |
|--------|------|
| `windowHeight` ref | 跟踪窗口高度，resize 时自动更新 |
| `tableHeight` computed | `max(300, windowHeight - 362)`——常规 tab 表格自动填满视口余下空间 |
| `historyTableHeight` computed | `tableHeight - 312`——历史趋势表格扣除图表区域后填满 |
| 所有 `el-table` | `max-height="420"` → `:height="tableHeight"` / `:height="historyTableHeight"` |
| CSS `.tab-content` | 增加 `display: flex; flex-direction: column` 让内容纵向填充 |
| CSS `.table-scroll-wrapper` | 增加 `flex: 1` 延展到底部 |
| CSS `.chart-container` | `height: 280px` + `flex-shrink: 0`，图表下方表格自动填满剩余空间 |

刷新页面即可看到效果。
</previous_assistant_message>

Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\frontend\\web\\src\\pages\\Finance.vue","old_str":"/* ===== 导航栏 ===== */\n.page-header {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  height: 56px;\n  padding: 0 20px;\n  background: var(--bg-secondary, #151c2e);\n  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default, #1e293b);\n  margin-bottom: 16px;\n  border-radius: 12px;\n}\n\n.header-left {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 16px;\n}\n\n.back-link {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 6px;\n  padding: 6px 12px;\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 1px solid var(--border-default);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  color: var(--text-secondary, #8b949e);\n  text-decoration: none;\n  font-size: 13px;\n  transition: all 0.2s;\n}\n\n.back-link:hover {\n  background: rgba(88,166,255,0.08);\n  color: #58a6ff;\n  border-color: #58a6ff;\n}\n\n.page-title {\n  font-size: 18px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: var(--text-primary, #c9cdd4);\n}","new_str":"/* ===== 导航栏：简洁文字行（无卡片背景） ===== */\n.page-header {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  margin-bottom: 12px;\n}\n\n.header-left {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 12px;\n}\n\n.back-link {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 4px;\n  color: var(--text-secondary, #8b949e);\n  text-decoration: none;\n  font-size: 13px;\n  transition: color 0.2s;\n}\n\n.back-link:hover {\n  color: #58a6ff;\n}\n\n.page-title {\n  font-size: 16px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: var(--text-primary, #c9cdd4);\n}"}

Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\frontend\\web\\src\\pages\\Finance.vue","old_str":"/* Element Plus 暗色覆盖 */\n::deep(.el-card) { background: var(--bg-card); border-color: var(--border-default); }\n::deep(.el-card__header) { padding: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default); }\n::deep(.el-tabs__nav-wrap::after) { background-color: var(--border-default); }\n::deep(.el-tabs__item) { color: var(--text-secondary, #8b949e); }\n::deep(.el-tabs__item.is-active) { color: #58a6ff; }\n::deep(.el-tabs__active-bar) { background-color: #58a6ff; }\n::deep(.el-table th.el-table__cell) { background-color: var(--bg-tertiary, #2d333b) !important; }","new_str":"/* Element Plus 暗色覆盖 */\n::deep(.el-card) { background: var(--bg-card); border-color: var(--border-default); }\n::deep(.el-card__header) { padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default); }\n/* Tab 卡片去掉 body 内边距，让表格撑满全宽 */\n:deep(.el-card .el-card__body) { padding: 8px !important; }\n::deep(.el-tabs__nav-wrap::after) { background-color: var(--border-default); }\n::deep(.el-tabs__item) { color: var(--text-secondary, #8b949e); }\n::deep(.el-tabs__item.is-active) { color: #58a6ff; }\n::deep(.el-tabs__active-bar) { background-color: #58a6ff; }\n::deep(.el-table th.el-table__cell) { background-color: var(--bg-tertiary, #2d333b) !important; }\n::deep(.el-table .cell) { padding: 4px 8px; }"}

<analysis>
The conversation involves iterative UI fixes for a Vue.js WeChat Mini Program frontend. The user repeatedly pointed out issues with navigation headers, button styles, and data loading across multiple pages. Key themes: 1) AppHeader component missing imports causing navigation bar not to render, 2) page-header CSS inconsistencies, 3) back button style evolution (plain text → bordered → 3D+shimmer), 4) StockList page width too narrow, 5) StockList data loading too slow, switched to preloaded static data. The user provided screenshots multiple times to illustrate issues.
</analysis>

<summary>

1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user wanted to fix and unify the navigation/header layout across all pages of a Vue.js web frontend (QuantTerminal). Specific requests included:
   - Make navigation headers consistent with the "行情详情" (StockDetail) page layout (AppHeader + simple text title row)
   - Fix missing AppHeader on multiple pages
   - Change "返回主页" (back to home) button from plain text to a button with visual effects
   - Make the back button 3D with shimmer/glow animation
   - Fix StockList (行情) page missing AppHeader
   - Fix StockList page being too narrow (max-width constraint)
   - Switch StockList from slow real-time API loading to preloaded static data mode

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Vue 3 with `<script setup>` composition API
   - Component import requirement: `<script setup>` requires explicit `import` for each component used in template
   - Scoped CSS with CSS variables (`--bg-secondary`, `--border-default`, `--text-secondary`, etc.)
   - CSS 3D button effects: `linear-gradient`, `box-shadow` layering, `inset` highlights, `::before` pseudo-element shimmer animation
   - `@keyframes` animation for shimmer effect
   - Computed properties for client-side filtering/pagination (replacing API calls)
   - Element Plus UI library (`el-table`, `ElMessage`, etc.)
   - Vite dev server with HMR (hot module replacement)

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`d:\Work_Area\AI\WeChatProject\WechatMiniProgram01\frontend\web\src\components\AppHeader.vue`** — Global navigation bar component. Read to understand it exists and is imported by StockDetail.vue only initially.

   - **`d:\Work_Area\AI\WeChatProject\WechatMiniProgram01\frontend\web\src\pages\Predict.vue`** — Added `import AppHeader from '@/components/AppHeader.vue'`. Updated `.back-link` CSS to 3D+shimmer style.

   - **`d:\Work_Area\AI\WeChatProject\WechatMiniProgram01\frontend\web\src\pages\Finance.vue`** — Added `import AppHeader from '@/components/AppHeader.vue'`. Updated `.back-link` CSS to 3D+shimmer style.

   - **`d:\Work_Area\AI\WeChatProject\WechatMiniProgram01\frontend\web\src\pages\Backtest.vue`** — Added `import AppHeader from '@/components/AppHeader.vue'`. Updated `.back-link` CSS to 3D+shimmer style.

   - **`d:\Work_Area\AI\WeChatProject\WechatMiniProgram01\frontend\web\src\pages\Train.vue`** — Added `import AppHeader from '@/components/AppHeader.vue'`. Updated `.back-link` CSS to 3D+shimmer style.

   - **`d:\Work_Area\AI\WeChatProject\WechatMiniProgram01\frontend\web\src\pages\StockDetail.vue`** — Already had AppHeader import. Updated `.back-link` CSS to 3D+shimmer style.

   - **`d:\Work_Area\AI\WeChatProject\WechatMiniProgram01\frontend\web\src\pages\StockList.vue`** — Major changes:
     - Added `import AppHeader from '@/components/AppHeader.vue'`
     - Removed `import { stockApi } from '@/api'` and `onMounted`
     - Replaced entire script section: removed API-based `loadStocks()` async function, replaced with static `ALL_STOCKS` array (~200 A-share stocks) and `computed` properties for filtering/pagination
     - Removed `v-loading="loading"` from `el-table`
     - Changed `.page-header` CSS from card-style (background, border, height:56px, border-radius:12px) to simple flex row (no background/border)
     - Changed `max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto` → `max-width: 100%` for full-width layout
     - Updated `.back-link` to 3D+shimmer style
     - Removed unused `.header-nav` / `.nav-item` CSS

   - **3D + Shimmer `.back-link` CSS pattern** (applied to all 6 pages):
     ```css
     .back-link {
       position: relative;
       display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
       padding: 7px 14px;
       background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1e2535 0%, #151c2e 100%);
       border: 1px solid #2a3348;
       border-radius: 8px;
       color: #8b949e; text-decoration: none;
       font-size: 13px;
       box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #0d1117, 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
       transition: all 0.25s ease;
       overflow: hidden;
     }
     .back-link::before {
       content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: -100%;
       width: 60%; height: 100%;
       background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(88,166,255,0.06), rgba(88,166,255,0.12), rgba(88,166,255,0.06), transparent);
       animation: btnShimmer 3s ease-in-out infinite;
     }
     @keyframes btnShimmer { 0%, 100% { left: -100%; } 50% { left: 120%; } }
     .back-link:hover {
       background: linear-gradient(180deg, #253050 0%, #1a2540 100%);
       color: #58a6ff; border-color: #58a6ff;
       box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #0d1829, 0 6px 16px rgba(88,166,255,0.15), 0 0 20px rgba(88,166,255,0.08), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
       transform: translateY(-1px);
     }
     .back-link:active { transform: translateY(1px); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 #0d1117, 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); }
     ```

4. Errors and Fixes:
   - **AppHeader not rendering on 5 pages**: Root cause was `<AppHeader />` in templates but missing `import AppHeader from '@/components/AppHeader.vue'` in `<script setup>`. Only StockDetail.vue had the import. Fixed by adding the import to Predict, Finance, Backtest, Train, and StockList.
   - **StockList page too narrow**: Caused by `max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto`. Fixed by changing to `max-width: 100%`.
   - **StockList page-header had card-style CSS**: Had background, border, height:56px, border-radius:12px unlike other pages. Fixed by removing those properties to match the simple flex row style.
   - **StockList API loading too slow/hanging**: Replaced real-time `stockApi.getList()` / `stockApi.search()` calls with a preloaded static `ALL_STOCKS` array and client-side `computed` filtering/pagination.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Systematically checked all page files for missing AppHeader imports
   - Unified `.page-header` CSS across all pages to match StockDetail's simple text-row layout
   - Evolved back button through 3 iterations per user feedback: plain text → bordered button → 3D+shimmer
   - Converted StockList from API-dependent to fully static/client-side for instant loading

6. All User Messages:
   - "导航还是没有改好，要和行情详情的 头部红色框的布局一样。" (with screenshot)
   - "现在是 apphead 没有啊。" (with screenshot showing missing AppHeader)
   - "返回主页 还是改成带按钮效果的吧。"
   - "按钮搞成3D 布局，带点闪烁。"
   - "行情" 页面 没有 apphander 头。不是行情详情。" (with screenshot)
   - "行情显示也太窄了。" (with screenshot)
   - "能不能做成预先加载的模式，实时同步太慢了。容易挂起。" (with screenshot)

{"type":"reasoning","text":"No lint errors. The implementation is complete. Let me summarize:\n\n1. User searches in the search box\n2. First checks ALL_STOCKS local list → if found, display immediately (fast)\n3. If NOT found locally, automatically calls `stockApi.search(keyword)` to do a real-time backend search\n4. Shows \"正在实时搜索...\" loading indicator\n5. If API finds results → displays them\n6. If API also finds nothing → shows \"未找到\" with \"直接查看 xxx 行情\" button\n\nThis way, the preloaded list provides instant results for common stocks, and any uncommon code triggers an automatic API fallback."}

已完成。现在的搜索逻辑：

1. **本地列表命中** → 即时显示（秒开）
2. **本地无匹配** → 自动调用后端 `stockApi.search()` 实时搜索，显示"正在实时搜索..."
3. **API 也找不到** → 显示"未找到"并提供"直接查看 xxx 行情"按钮

刷新页面后，输入 `300432` 会先检查本地列表（已补充，命中），输入任意未收录代码会自动触发后端实时查询。

Tool: replace_in_file
Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\docs\\09_开发过程FAQ_更新03.md","old_str":"**修改文件：** `frontend/web/src/pages/Finance.vue`（模板 + 样式）\n\n\n> 📝 最后更新：2026-05-21\n> 📌 版本：V4.1","new_str":"**修改文件：** `frontend/web/src/pages/Finance.vue`（模板 + 样式）\n\n---\n\n### 6.12 各页面 AppHeader 全局导航栏缺失修复（2026-05-21）\n\n**问题：**\n5个页面（Predict、Finance、Backtest、Train、StockList）模板中使用了 `<AppHeader />`，但 `<script setup>` 中未 `import AppHeader`，导致导航栏不渲染。\n\n**根本原因：**\n- Vue 3 `<script setup>` 要求显式 `import` 每个组件，不能自动从其他文件继承导入\n- 只有 StockDetail.vue 正确导入了 AppHeader，其他页面遗漏\n\n**修复方式：**\n在以下 5 个文件的 `<script setup>` 中添加：\n```javascript\nimport AppHeader from '@/components/AppHeader.vue'\n```\n\n**修改文件：**\n- `frontend/web/src/pages/Predict.vue`\n- `frontend/web/src/pages/Finance.vue`\n- `frontend/web/src/pages/Backtest.vue`\n- `frontend/web/src/pages/Train.vue`\n- `frontend/web/src/pages/StockList.vue`\n\n---\n\n### 6.13 返回主页按钮升级为 3D + 闪烁效果（2026-05-21）\n\n**需求演进：**\n1. 初期：按钮为纯文字链接，视觉效果弱\n2. 第二版：添加边框样式\n3. 最终版：3D 浮雕效果 + 流光闪烁动画\n\n**最终 CSS 设计要点：**\n\n```css\n.back-link {\n  /* 3D 渐变背景 */\n  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1e2535 0%, #151c2e 100%);\n  border: 1px solid #2a3348;\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  /* 多层阴影模拟 3D 效果 */\n  box-shadow:\n    0 2px 0 #0d1117,           /* 底部厚度 */\n    0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), /* 环境阴影 */\n    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.04); /* 顶部高光 */\n}\n\n/* 流光动画（伪元素） */\n.back-link::before {\n  content: '';\n  position: absolute;\n  width: 60%; height: 100%;\n  left: -100%;\n  background: linear-gradient(90deg,\n    transparent,\n    rgba(88,166,255,0.06),\n    rgba(88,166,255,0.12),\n    rgba(88,166,255,0.06),\n    transparent\n  );\n  animation: btnShimmer 3s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n\n@keyframes btnShimmer {\n  0%, 100% { left: -100%; }\n  50% { left: 120%; }\n}\n\n/* hover 高亮 */\n.back-link:hover {\n  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #253050 0%, #1a2540 100%);\n  color: #58a6ff;\n  border-color: #58a6ff;\n  box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(88,166,255,0.08);\n  transform: translateY(-1px);\n}\n\n/* 按下时下沉 */\n.back-link:active {\n  transform: translateY(1px);\n}\n```\n\n**修改文件（6个页面均应用）：**\n- `frontend/web/src/pages/StockDetail.vue`\n- `frontend/web/src/pages/Predict.vue`\n- `frontend/web/src/pages/Finance.vue`\n- `frontend/web/src/pages/Backtest.vue`\n- `frontend/web/src/pages/Train.vue`\n- `frontend/web/src/pages/StockList.vue`\n\n---\n\n### 6.14 StockList 行情页面预加载模式 + 中文名称（2026-05-21）\n\n**问题：**\n1. StockList 原来通过 API 调用 `stockApi.getList()` / `stockApi.search()` 加载数据，实时请求速度慢、容易挂起\n2. 名称列显示股票代码而非中文名称\n\n**修复方式：**\n\n**1. 预加载静态数据：**\n- 移除 `onMounted` 中的 `stockApi` 异步调用\n- 内置 `ALL_STOCKS` 静态数组（约200只A股热门股票），包含 `code`、`name`（中文）、`market`、`industry` 字段\n- 搜索和分页改为纯客户端 `computed` 计算：\n\n```javascript\n/** 搜索过滤（纯客户端计算） */\nconst filteredStocks = computed(() => {\n  const kw = (searchKeyword.value || '').trim().toLowerCase()\n  if (!kw) return ALL_STOCKS\n  return ALL_STOCKS.filter(s =>\n    s.code.includes(kw) ||\n    s.name.toLowerCase().includes(kw) ||\n    (s.industry || '').toLowerCase().includes(kw)\n  )\n})\n\n/** 分页切片 */\nconst stocks = computed(() => {\n  const start = (currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize\n  return filteredStocks.value.slice(start, start + pageSize)\n})\n```\n\n**2. 布局修复：**\n- `max-width: 1400px` → `max-width: 100%`（解决页面过窄问题）\n- 移除 `v-loading=\"loading\"` 属性（无需加载状态）\n- `.page-header` 从卡片样式改为简洁文字行（与其他页面统一）\n\n**修改文件：** `frontend/web/src/pages/StockList.vue`\n\n---\n\n### 6.15 StockList 重复数据与编译错误修复（2026-05-21）\n\n**问题：**\n1. 编译报错 `Duplicate </script>` — 第329-330行有两个 `</script>` 结束标签\n2. 编译报错 `Unexpected token` 在数组末尾 — 删除重复数据时误删了数组结束符 `];`\n3. 数据重复项：\n   - `600588` 用友网络（出现2次）\n   - `601399` 工商银行（错误代码，正确应为 601398）\n   - `688981` 中芯国际（出现2次）\n\n**修复方式：**\n- 删除多余的 `</script>` 标签\n- 补回缺失的 `];` 数组结束符\n- 删除3条重复/错误数据\n\n**修改文件：** `frontend/web/src/pages/StockList.vue`\n\n**经验教训：**\n- 使用 `replace_in_file` 删除重复条目时，注意 `old_str` 不要包含相邻的结构标记（如 `];`），避免连带删除\n\n---\n\n> 📝 最后更新：2026-05-21\n> 📌 版本：V4.2"}

Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\frontend\\web\\src\\pages\\StockList.vue","old_str":"/** 点击行跳转详情 */\nconst handleRowClick = (row) => {\n  router.push(`/stock/${row.code}`)\n}\nconst viewDetail = (code) => {\n  router.push(`/stock/${code}`)\n}","new_str":"/** 点击行跳转详情 */\nconst handleRowClick = (row) => {\n  router.push(`/stock/${row.code}`)\n}\nconst viewDetail = (code) => {\n  router.push(`/stock/${code}`)\n}\n\n/**\n * 搜索无匹配时，直接跳转到输入代码的行情详情页\n * @param {string} code - 用户输入的股票代码\n */\nconst viewDirectSearch = (code) => {\n  const cleanCode = (code || '').trim()\n  if (!cleanCode) return\n  // 简单校验：A股代码为6位数字\n  if (/^\\d{6}$/.test(cleanCode)) {\n    router.push(`/stock/${cleanCode}`)\n  } else {\n    // 非法格式提示\n    ElMessage.warning('请输入正确的6位股票代码')\n  }\n}"}

Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\frontend\\web\\src\\pages\\StockList.vue","old_str":"import { ref, computed } from 'vue'\nimport { useRouter } from 'vue-router'\nimport { ElMessage } from 'element-plus'\nimport AppHeader from '@/components/AppHeader.vue'\n\nconst router = useRouter()\n\nconst searchKeyword = ref('')\nconst currentPage = ref(1)\nconst pageSize = 50","new_str":"import { ref, computed } from 'vue'\nimport { useRouter } from 'vue-router'\nimport { ElMessage } from 'element-plus'\nimport AppHeader from '@/components/AppHeader.vue'\nimport { stockApi } from '@/api'\n\nconst router = useRouter()\n\nconst searchKeyword = ref('')\nconst currentPage = ref(1)\nconst pageSize = 50\n\n/** 实时搜索状态 */\nconst searchLoading = ref(false)\nconst apiResults = ref([])\nconst apiSearched = ref(false)"}

Tool: replace_in_file
Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\frontend\\web\\src\\pages\\StockList.vue","old_str":"/** 当前页数据 */\nconst stocks = computed(() => {\n  const start = (currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize\n  return filteredStocks.value.slice(start, start + pageSize)\n})\nconst total = computed(() => filteredStocks.value.length)","new_str":"/** 当前页数据：优先显示本地列表，本地无匹配时使用API搜索结果 */\nconst stocks = computed(() => {\n  // 有API搜索结果时优先显示\n  if (apiResults.value.length > 0) {\n    const start = (currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize\n    return apiResults.value.slice(start, start + pageSize)\n  }\n  const start = (currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize\n  return filteredStocks.value.slice(start, start + pageSize)\n})\nconst total = computed(() =>\n  apiResults.value.length > 0 ? apiResults.value.length : filteredStocks.value.length\n)"}

<previous_tool_call>
Tool: replace_in_file
Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\frontend\\web\\src\\pages\\StockList.vue","old_str":"/** 客户端搜索，立即生效 */\nconst handleSearch = () => {\n  currentPage.value = 1\n}","new_str":"/**\n * 客户端搜索：本地列表优先，无匹配时自动调用后端API实时搜索\n */\nconst handleSearch = () => {\n  currentPage.value = 1\n  // 清除之前的API结果\n  apiResults.value = []\n  apiSearched.value = false\n\n  const kw = (searchKeyword.value || '').trim()\n  if (!kw) return\n\n  // 本地列表中有匹配，无需API\n  if (filteredStocks.value.length > 0) return\n\n  // 本地无匹配 → 调用后端实时搜索\n  fetchFromApi(kw)\n}\n\n/**\n * 后端API实时搜索股票\n * @param {string} keyword - 搜索关键词\n */\nconst fetchFromApi = async (keyword) => {\n  searchLoading.value = true\n  apiSearched.value = true\n  try {\n    const res = await stockApi.search(keyword)\n    if (res && res.stocks && res.stocks.length > 0) {\n      // 映射后端返回字段为展示格式\n      apiResults.value = res.stocks.map(s => ({\n        code: s.code,\n        name: s.name,\n        market: s.code?.startsWith('6') ? 'SH' : 'SZ',\n        industry: s.industry || s.industry_name || ''\n      }))\n    } else {\n      apiResults.value = []\n    }\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.error('实时搜索失败:', e)\n    apiResults.value = []\n    ElMessage.warning('实时搜索失败，请稍后重试')\n  } finally {\n    searchLoading.value = false\n  }\n}"}
<result><omitted /></result>
</previous_tool_call>

无报错。修复完成，主要改动：

**HQChartKline.vue 重写要点：**

| 问题 | 修复 |
|------|------|
| 数据为空时提前返回，后续数据到了但实例为 null | 数据为空时不返回，等 watch 触发 refresh 时再初始化 |
| 无重试机制 | 失败后自动重试最多 3 次（间隔递增：500ms/1s/1.5s）|
| HQChart 内部可能发起网络请求导致 "初始化失败" | 添加 `NetworkRequest` 覆盖函数 + `Request: null`，完全禁用网络 |
| 错误无用户反馈 | 显示错误覆盖层 + **点击重试按钮** |
| 初始化延迟仅 300ms（可能不够） | 延迟增至 500ms |

无报错。本次修复的关键点：

| 问题 | 根因 | 修复 |
|------|------|------|
| K线空白 | HQChart 内部发起网络请求失败，显示内部错误 "初始化失败请查看网络" | 3层拦截：`NetworkFilter=[]` + `Request:null` + `NetworkRequest` 空函数 |
| Symbol 格式 | 传 `300004`，HQChart 需要 `sz300004`（带市场前缀） | 新增 `getSymbol()` 自动添加前缀 |
| 内部回调模式未关闭 | HQChart 默认用内置 API 拉取数据 | 加 `IsApiCallbackReturn: true` |
| 无调试信息 | 不知道哪一步出错 | 加 `console.debug` 日志链路 |
| 错误无交互 | 用户只能刷新页面 | 显示 **"点击重试"** 按钮 |

请 **Ctrl+F5 强制刷新** 页面后访问 `/stock/300004` 测试。打开浏览器 F12 控制台可以看到 `[HQChart]` 开头的详细日志。如果仍出现错误层，直接点击 **"点击重试"** 按钮。

**HQChartKline.vue 重写要点：**

| 问题 | 修复 |
|------|------|
| 数据为空时提前返回，后续数据到了但实例为 null | 数据为空时不返回，等 watch 触发 refresh 时再初始化 |
| 无重试机制 | 失败后自动重试最多 3 次（间隔递增：500ms/1s/1.5s）|
| HQChart 内部可能发起网络请求导致 "初始化失败" | 添加 `NetworkRequest` 覆盖函数 + `Request: null`，完全禁用网络 |

| 无调试信息 | 不知道哪一步出错 | 加 `console.debug` 日志链路 |
| 错误无交互 | 用户只能刷新页面 | 显示 **"点击重试"** 按钮 |

| # | 问题 | 修复 |
|---|------|------|
| 1 | `import { JSChart }` → `undefined` | 改为 `import HQChart from 'hqchart'` |
| 2 | `JSChart.Init(el, 'dark')` → 2个参数| `HQChart.Chart.JSChart.Init(el)` 只接受 DOM |
| 3 | `NetworkFilter: []` 应是函数 | 改为 `function(data, callback)` 拦截请求返回本地数据 |
| 4 | 用不存在的 `SetData`/`Draw` 方法 | 通过 `NetworkFilter` 回调提供数据 |
| 5 | 数据格式不对 | 改为HQChart要求的 `[yyyymmdd, yclose, open, ...]` 格式 |

## 关键修复：HQChart 导入和 API 正确用法

控制台报 `Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'Init')` 是因为 **hqchart 包的导入方式完全错误**。

| 错误写法 | 正确写法 |
|---------|---------|
| `import { JSChart } from 'hqchart'` | `import HQChart from 'hqchart'` |
| `JSChart.Init(el, 'dark')` | `HQChart.Chart.JSChart.Init(el)` |
| `NetworkFilter: []` (数组) | `NetworkFilter: function(data, callback)` (函数) |
| `chart.SetData(...)` + `chart.Draw()` | 数据通过 `NetworkFilter` 回调返回，HQChart 内部自动渲染 |
| `chart.Destroy()` | 清空 `innerHTML` + `null` 引用 |

**核心架构变化：**

之前尝试用 `SetData` 直接注入数据，但 HQChart 根本没有这个方法。HQChart 的数据获取机制是通过 **`NetworkFilter` 回调拦截**：

```javascript
NetworkFilter: function(data, callback) {
    data.PreventDefault = true  // 阻止网络请求
    // 根据请求类型返回本地数据
    callback({ code: 0, data: [[日期数值, 昨收, 开, 高, 低, 收, 量, 额], ...] })
}
```

请 **Ctrl+F5 强制刷新** 后测试 `/stock/300004`。
