Tool: replace_in_file
Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\frontend\\web\\src\\pages\\Home.vue","old_str":"const showAddDialog = ref(false)\nconst mainChartRef = ref(null)","new_str":"const showAddDialog = ref(false)\nconst mainChartRef = ref(null)\n\n// ============ 分时明细弹窗（回车键打开）============\nconst showIntradayDialog = ref(false)\nconst intradayData = ref({ code: '', date: '', stats: {}, minutes: [], transactions: [] })\nconst intradayChartRef = ref(null)\nlet intradayChartInstance = null\n\n/** 打开分时明细窗口 */\nconst openIntradayDialog = async () => {\n  if (!currentStock.value) return\n  const code = currentStock.value\n  \n  // 从 K 线获取当前选中日期（取最后可见K线的日期）\n  const option = chartInstance.getOption()\n  const xAxisData = option.xAxis?.[0]?.data || []\n  const dz = option.dataZoom?.[0]\n  let targetDate = ''\n  \n  if (dz && xAxisData.length > 0) {\n    // 取 dataZoom 范围内最后一个日期\n    const startIdx = Math.floor((dz.start / 100) * xAxisData.length)\n    const endIdx = Math.floor((dz.end / 100) * xAxisData.length) - 1\n    targetDate = xAxisData[Math.min(endIdx, xAxisData.length - 1)] || xAxisData[xAxisData.length - 1] || ''\n  } else if (xAxisData.length > 0) {\n    targetDate = xAxisData[xAxisData.length - 1]\n  }\n  \n  try {\n    showIntradayDialog.value = true\n    const res = await stockApi.getIntraday(code, targetDate)\n    \n    if (res.data && (res.data.minutes?.length || res.data.transactions?.length)) {\n      intradayData.value = {\n        code,\n        date: res.data.date || targetDate,\n        stats: res.data.stats || {},\n        minutes: res.data.minutes || [],\n        transactions: res.data.transactions || [],\n      }\n      // 延迟渲染图表，等 DOM 挂载\n      setTimeout(() => renderIntradayChart(), 100)\n    } else {\n      ElMessage.warning('暂无该日分时数据')\n      showIntradayDialog.value = false\n    }\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error('加载分时数据失败:', err)\n    ElMessage.error('加载分时数据失败')\n    showIntradayDialog.value = false\n  }\n}\n\n/** 渲染分时成交量柱状图 */\nconst renderIntradayChart = () => {\n  if (!intradayChartRef.value) return\n  \n  if (intradayChartInstance) {\n    intradayChartInstance.dispose()\n  }\n  \n  intradayChartInstance = echarts.init(intradayChartRef.value)\n  const mins = intradayData.value.minutes || []\n  \n  if (!mins.length) return\n  \n  const times = mins.map(m => m.time?.substring(0, 5) || '')\n  const volumes = mins.map(m => m.volume || 0)\n  const colors = mins.map(m =>\n    m.open <= m.close ? 'rgba(239,68,68,0.7)' : 'rgba(34,197,94,0.7)'\n  )\n  \n  intradayChartInstance.setOption({\n    grid: { top: 10, right: 15, bottom: 25, left: 35 },\n    xAxis: {\n      type: 'category', data: times,\n      axisLabel: { color: '#6e7681', fontSize: 9, rotate: 45, interval: Math.floor(times.length / 8) },\n      axisLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#30363d' } },\n      splitLine: { show: true, lineStyle: { color: '#21262d' } },\n    },\n    yAxis: {\n      type: 'value',\n      axisLabel: { color: '#6e7681', fontSize: 9 },\n      axisLine: { show: false },\n      splitLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#30363d', type: 'dashed' } },\n    },\n    series: [{\n      type: 'bar', data: volumes,\n      itemStyle: { color: (idx) => colors[idx] },\n      barMaxWidth: 6,\n    }],\n  }, true)\n}\n\n/** 关闭分时弹窗 */\nconst closeIntradayDialog = () => {\n  showIntradayDialog.value = false\n  if (intradayChartInstance) {\n    intradayChartInstance.dispose()\n    intradayChartInstance = null\n  }\n}"}

Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\frontend\\web\\src\\pages\\Home.vue","old_str":"    </el-dialog>\n\n\n    <!-- 底部状态栏（共享组件） -->","new_str":"    </el-dialog>\n\n\n    <!-- 分时明细弹窗（回车键打开，仿通达信风格） -->\n    <el-dialog\n      v-model=\"showIntradayDialog\"\n      :title=\"intradayData.code ? `${selectedStock?.name || intradayData.code}(${intradayData.code}) ${intradayData.date}` : '分时明细'\"\n      width=\"860px\"\n      :modal=\"true\"\n      class=\"intraday-dialog\"\n      @close=\"closeIntradayDialog\"\n    >\n      <!-- 顶部统计栏 -->\n      <div v-if=\"intradayData.stats.open\" class=\"intraday-stats\">\n        <span>开: <b>{{ intradayData.stats.open }}</b></span>\n        <span>高: <b>{{ intradayData.stats.high }}</b></span>\n        <span>低: <b>{{ intradayData.stats.low }}</b></span>\n        <span>收: <b>{{ intradayData.stats.close }}</b></span>\n        <span>量: <b>{{ formatVolume(intradayData.stats.total_volume) }}</b></span>\n        <span\n          :class=\"{ up: intradayData.stats.change > 0, down: intradayData.stats.change < 0 }\"\n        >\n          {{ intradayData.stats.change >= 0 ? '+' : '' }}{{ intradayData.stats.change }}\n          ({{ intradayData.stats.pct_change >= 0 ? '+' : '' }}{{ intradayData.stats.pct_change }}%)\n        </span>\n      </div>\n\n      <!-- 主内容区：左侧价格列表 + 右侧分笔成交 -->\n      <div class=\"intraday-body\">\n        <!-- 左侧：价格档位列表 -->\n        <div class=\"price-ladder\">\n          <div\n            v-for=\"(p, i) in sortedPriceLadder\"\n            :key=\"i\"\n            class=\"ladder-row\"\n            :class=\"{ up: p.pct > 0, down: p.pct < 0 }\"\n          >\n            <span class=\"lp-price\">{{ p.price.toFixed(2) }}</span>\n            <span class=\"lp-pct\">{{ p.pct >= 0 ? '+' : '' }}{{ p.pct.toFixed(2) }}%</span>\n            <span class=\"lp-vol\">{{ formatVolume(p.volume) }}</span>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <!-- 中间：分时成交量图 -->\n        <div class=\"intraday-chart-area\">\n          <div ref=\"intradayChartRef\" style=\"width:100%;height:100%\"></div>\n        </div>\n\n        <!-- 右侧：分笔成交 -->\n        <div class=\"tick-list\">\n          <div class=\"tick-header\">\n            <span>时间</span><span>价格</span><span>量</span><span></span>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"tick-body\" ref=\"tickBodyRef\">\n            <div\n              v-for=\"(t, i) in intradayData.transactions\"\n              :key=\"i\"\n              class=\"tick-row\"\n              :class=\"{ buy: t.direction === 'B', sell: t.direction === 'S' }\"\n            >\n              <span>{{ t.time.substring(0,5) }}</span>\n              <span>{{ t.price.toFixed(2) }}</span>\n              <span>{{ t.volume }}</span>\n              <span class=\"dir\">{{ t.direction === 'B' ? '买' : t.direction === 'S' ? '卖' : '' }}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div v-if=\"!intradayData.transactions.length\" class=\"tick-empty\">暂无分笔数据</div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <!-- 底部提示 -->\n      <template #footer>\n        <span class=\"intraday-tip\">PageUp/Down 切换前后日 | 空格 操作 | Enter 关闭</span>\n      </template>\n    </el-dialog>\n\n\n    <!-- 底部状态栏（共享组件） -->"}

Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\frontend\\web\\src\\pages\\Home.vue","old_str":"const currentStock = ref('')\nconst selectedStock = ref(null)","new_str":"const currentStock = ref('')\nconst selectedStock = ref(null)\n\n/**\n * 分时价格档位列表（从高到低排序）\n * 按分钟数据的价格聚合，计算每档的涨跌幅和成交量\n */\nconst sortedPriceLadder = computed(() => {\n  const mins = intradayData.value.minutes || []\n  if (!mins.length) return []\n  \n  // 聚合：相同价格的合并\n  const priceMap = new Map()\n  const openPrice = intradayData.value.stats.open || 0\n  \n  for (const m of mins) {\n    if (priceMap.has(m.price)) {\n      const existing = priceMap.get(m.price)\n      existing.volume += (m.volume || 0)\n    } else {\n      priceMap.set(m.price, { price: m.price, volume: m.volume || 0 })\n    }\n  }\n  \n  const ladder = Array.from(priceMap.values())\n  // 按价格降序\n  ladder.sort((a, b) => b.price - a.price)\n  // 计算相对开盘价的涨幅%\n  for (const p of ladder) {\n    p.pct = openPrice ? ((p.price - openPrice) / openPrice) * 100 : 0\n  }\n  \n  return ladder.slice(0, 30)  // 最多显示30档\n})"}

<previous_assistant_message>
全部完成，无语法错误。总结改动：

---

## 新增：回车 → 分时明细窗口（仿通达信）

### 改动清单

| 文件 | 改动 |
|---|---|
| `backend/api/stock.py` | 新增 `GET /api/stock/intraday` 接口（分钟K线 + 分笔成交 + 当日统计） |
| `frontend/src/api/stock.js` | 新增 `getIntraday(code, date)` 方法 |
| `frontend/src/pages/Home.vue` | 回车键处理、弹窗模板/逻辑/样式 |

### 功能说明

1. **触发方式**：在 K 线图区域按 **Enter** 键
2. **弹窗内容**（仿截图）：
   - **顶部**：开/高/低/收/量/涨跌幅统计栏
   - **左侧**：价格档位列表（从高到低，含涨幅%和成交量）
   - **中间**：分时成交量柱状图（红涨绿跌）
   - **右侧**：分笔成交明细（时间/价格/量/买卖方向）
3. **数据来源**：
   - 分钟K线：`mootdx minute()` → 1分钟粒度
   - 分笔成交：`mootdx transaction()` → 逐笔数据
4. **日期**：自动取当前 dataZoom 范围内最后可见的 K 线日期

### 限制
- 历史日分时数据需要本地通达信数据文件支持（`tdx_local`），当天实时数据通过 `tdx_hq` 获取
- 如无数据会显示"暂无该日分时数据"提示

重启后端后即可测试。
</previous_assistant_message>

Arguments: {"filePath":"d:\\Work_Area\\AI\\WeChatProject\\WechatMiniProgram01\\frontend\\web\\src\\pages\\Home.vue","old_str":"/** 渲染分时成交量柱状图 */\nconst renderIntradayChart = () => {\n  if (!intradayChartRef.value) return\n  \n  if (intradayChartInstance) {\n    intradayChartInstance.dispose()\n  }\n  \n  intradayChartInstance = echarts.init(intradayChartRef.value)\n  const mins = intradayData.value.minutes || []\n  \n  if (!mins.length) return\n  \n  const times = mins.map(m => m.time?.substring(0, 5) || '')\n  const volumes = mins.map(m => m.volume || 0)\n  const colors = mins.map(m =>\n    m.open <= m.close ? 'rgba(239,68,68,0.7)' : 'rgba(34,197,94,0.7)'\n  )\n  \n  intradayChartInstance.setOption({\n    grid: { top: 10, right: 15, bottom: 25, left: 35 },\n    xAxis: {\n      type: 'category', data: times,\n      axisLabel: { color: '#6e7681', fontSize: 9, rotate: 45, interval: Math.floor(times.length / 8) },\n      axisLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#30363d' } },\n      splitLine: { show: true, lineStyle: { color: '#21262d' } },\n    },\n    yAxis: {\n      type: 'value',\n      axisLabel: { color: '#6e7681', fontSize: 9 },\n      axisLine: { show: false },\n      splitLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#30363d', type: 'dashed' } },\n    },\n    series: [{\n      type: 'bar', data: volumes,\n      itemStyle: { color: (idx) => colors[idx] },\n      barMaxWidth: 6,\n    }],\n  }, true)\n}","new_str":"/** 渲染分时走势图（价格曲线 + 均价线 + 成交量） */\nconst renderIntradayChart = () => {\n  if (!intradayChartRef.value) return\n  \n  if (intradayChartInstance) {\n    intradayChartInstance.dispose()\n  }\n  \n  intradayChartInstance = echarts.init(intradayChartRef.value)\n  const mins = intradayData.value.minutes || []\n  \n  if (!mins.length) return\n  \n  const times = mins.map(m => m.time?.substring(0, 5) || '')\n  const prices = mins.map(m => m.close || m.price || 0)\n  const volumes = mins.map(m => m.volume || 0)\n  const openPrice = intradayData.value.stats.open || prices[0]\n  \n  // 均价线（累计成交额 / 累计成交量）\n  const avgPrices = []\n  let cumVol = 0, cumAmt = 0\n  for (const m of mins) {\n    cumVol += (m.volume || 0)\n    cumAmt += ((m.amount || m.close * m.volume) || 0)\n    avgPrices.push(cumVol > 0 ? cumAmt / cumVol : (prices[0] || 0))\n  }\n  \n  // 昨收线（水平参考线）\n  const yestClose = openPrice  // 分时图以上一交易日收盘为基准\n  \n  // 成交量颜色：当前价≥昨日收盘红柱，反之为绿柱\n  const volColors = mins.map(m => {\n    const p = m.close || m.price || 0\n    return p >= yestClose ? 'rgba(239,68,68,0.65)' : 'rgba(34,197,94,0.65)'\n  })\n  \n  // 价格范围：用于Y轴\n  const allPrices = [...prices, yestClose, ...avgPrices].filter(p => p > 0)\n  const priceMin = Math.min(...allPrices)\n  const priceMax = Math.max(...allPrices)\n  const pricePadding = (priceMax - priceMin) * 0.1 || priceMax * 0.02\n  \n  intradayChartInstance.setOption({\n    // 上下两个grid\n    grid: [\n      { left: 8, right: 12, top: 5, bottom: '55%', height: '40%' },\n      { left: 8, right: 12, top: '52%', bottom: 5, height: '28%' },\n    ],\n    // 公共X轴（时间）\n    xAxis: [\n      {\n        type: 'category', data: times, gridIndex: 0,\n        axisLabel: { show: false },\n        axisLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#30363d' } },\n        axisTick: { show: false },\n        splitLine: { show: true, lineStyle: { color: '#21262d' } },\n      },\n      {\n        type: 'category', data: times, gridIndex: 1,\n        axisLabel: {\n          color: '#6e7681', fontSize: 9,\n          interval: Math.max(1, Math.floor(times.length / 6)),\n        },\n        axisLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#30363d' } },\n        axisTick: { show: false },\n        splitLine: { show: true, lineStyle: { color: '#21262d' } },\n      },\n    ],\n    yAxis: [\n      {\n        type: 'value', gridIndex: 0, scale: true,\n        min: priceMin - pricePadding,\n        max: priceMax + pricePadding,\n        axisLabel: { color: '#c9d1d9', fontSize: 10, formatter: v => v.toFixed(2) },\n        axisLine: { show: false },\n        splitLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#30363d', type: 'dashed' } },\n      },\n      {\n        type: 'value', gridIndex: 1,\n        axisLabel: { color: '#6e7681', fontSize: 9 },\n        axisLine: { show: false },\n        splitLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#30363d', type: 'dashed' } },\n      },\n    ],\n    series: [\n      // 分时价格曲线（白色）\n      {\n        type: 'line', data: prices, xAxisIndex: 0, yAxisIndex: 0,\n        smooth: true,\n        symbol: 'none',\n        lineStyle: { color: '#ffffff', width: 1.5 },\n        areaStyle: {\n          color: new echarts.graphic.LinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 1, [\n            { offset: 0, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)' },\n            { offset: 1, color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0)' },\n          ]),\n        },\n        markLine: {\n          silent: true,\n          symbol: 'none',\n          lineStyle: { color: '#ffe57f', width: 1, type: 'dashed' },\n          data: [{ yAxis: yestClose, label: { formatter: `昨收:${yestClose.toFixed(2)}`, color: '#ffe57f', fontSize: 10 } }],\n        },\n      },\n      // 均价线（黄色虚线）\n      {\n        type: 'line', data: avgPrices, xAxisIndex: 0, yAxisIndex: 0,\n        smooth: true,\n        symbol: 'none',\n        lineStyle: { color: '#e3b341', width: 1, type: 'dotted' },\n      },\n      // 成交量柱子\n      {\n        type: 'bar', data: volumes, xAxisIndex: 1, yAxisIndex: 1,\n        itemStyle: { color: (idx) => volColors[idx.dataIndex] },\n        barMaxWidth: 4,\n      },\n    ],\n  }, true)\n}"}

## 中间区域：新增分时价格曲线

原本只有成交量柱子，现在改为**上下双图**的结构：

```
┌─────────────────────────────┐
│  分时价格曲线 (白色实线)      │  ← 新增
│  均价线 (黄色虚线)           │  ← 新增
│  昨收参考线 (金色虚线)        │  ← 新增
├─────────────────────────────┤
│  成交量柱状图 (红涨绿跌)      │  ← 保留
└─────────────────────────────┘
```

- **白色曲线**：每分钟收盘价的连线 + 渐变填充区域
- **黄色虚线**：均价线（累计成交额 / 累计成交量）
- **金色虚线 + 标记**：昨收参考线，标注数值
- **底部红/绿柱子**：每分钟成交量

同时弹窗高度从 400px 扩到 450px 以容纳双图。重启后端即可体验。
</previous_assistant_message>
